title: Flappy Rush
description: flappy rush is a simple casual game. touch to fly, hold to hover and release to fall. in this game your agility will be tested, pass obstacles and don't crash to stay alive, enjoy the music and complete levels that challenge your adrenaline

title: Z Stick Duel Fighting
description: Join the ultimate stickman battle in Z Stick Duel Fighting, a game that will make you fight for glory. You will play as a stickman warrior who must face other stickmen from across the universe. Can you win this duel competition? Various exciting and handsome skills are waiting for you to try! Calculate the amount of mana, avoid the enemy's attacks, and deliver a fatal blow! You are the stickman fighting king of the universe!

title: Falling Blocks Puzzle
description: Falling Blocks Puzzle is a timeless puzzle game where players arrange falling geometric shapes, to form complete horizontal lines. As lines are completed, they disappear, and players earn points. The game ends when the stack of shapes reaches the top of the screen. It’s a test of strategy and quick thinking, beloved by gamers worldwide.

title: Traffic Jam Hop On
description: In Traffic Jam: Hop On, challenge your strategy thinking and quick reflexes! This wonderful puzzle game will take you into a colorful parking lot. Your task is to help all kinds of vehicles get out of traffic jams and start smoothly.

title: 2048 Run Gorgeous Balls
description: 2048 Run: Gorgeous Balls is a fun arcade game that invites you to chase high scores in a delightful environment! In this creative 2048-style game, you’ll control a colorful array of balls as they race along a dynamic track.

title: Winter Wolf
description: Winter has come, and the snowfall has begun. Since it's Christmas time, the wolf must find three stars during the winter. The wolf needs to carefully hunt and catch three sheep, take their stars, and gather all the bones on the path to avoid starving. It must also be cautious of the hunters in the forest. At the end of the level, it must reach the dark portal to teleport to its desired location.

title: Sticker Jam Peel Off & Match
description: Play Sticker Jam, the ultimate matching puzzle game! Peel vibrant stickers, match colors, and solve fun challenges. Relax and unwind with this unique blend of calming gameplay and brain-teasing puzzles. Perfect for hours of entertainment—start playing now!

title: Knee Case Simulator
description: Knee Case Simulator is a delightful beauty and doctor simulation game where you get to showcase your medical skills and fashion sense! Help Tiara recover from her knee injury and give her a stylish makeover once she's feeling better.

title: The Walking Deadblocks
description: A fast-paced, cooperative survival game where players battle relentless waves of zombies across dynamic day-night cycles. Survive as long as possible by managing resources, unlocking new maps, and utilizing unique character abilities. Nights bring increased danger with randomized enemy spawns, challenging players to strategize using generators and lights to stay alive.

title: Mega Lamba Ramp
description: Crazy car stunts and stunt car racing games that will give you the most thrilling experience. Perform dangerous stunts on impossible tracks in our racing and stunt simulator. Perform stunts on all the cars for your favorite characters to move to the next level!

title: Turret Gunner
description:
You will find yourself in a thrilling air battle simulation, filled with exciting moments and countless enemy targets. You’ll be able to maneuver, shoot, and fight virtual opponents, experiencing the true adrenaline rush of an airstrike.

This captivating journey into the world of aviation will leave unforgettable impressions on fans of extreme action and flying. Feel like a real pilot and enjoy the excitement of aerial combat!

title: Merry Christmas Stickman
description: Help Stickman escape from jail just in time for the holidays! This time, he’s on his own, relying solely on a mysterious Christmas package filled with special items. Choose carefully to aid his breakout in this festive, story-driven adventure packed with seasonal surprises—can Stickman make it to freedom before the New Year?

title: SnakeMaxx
description: Dive into thrilling PvP battles or solo runs! Unlock avatars, skins, and boosters to power up your snake in this fast-paced action runner.

title: Neko's Adventure
description: Neko’s Adventure is a vibrant platformer starring Neko, a playful cat trying to rescue his girlfriend. Explore 20 challenging levels, unlock the Power Beam to shoot fire, and face quirky enemies in a whimsical, fast-paced adventure full of charm, excitement, and cartoon fun!

title: Zumba Story
description: Explore every corner of the jungle, create combinations and shoot colorful marbles. With each level, face unique challenges and utilize powerful boosters to enhance your skills. Unlock exciting chapters, conquer obstacles, and experience a vibrant journey full of surprises!

title: Spiderlox Theme Park Battle
description: Join a creative and action sandbox adventure in Spiderlox Theme Park Battle! You'll play the role of a superhero Spiderman. Explore a huge theme park. Begin an exciting fight. In the game, you will face many enemies. Use your agility and strategy to win.

title: Sprunki Challenge
description: Sprunki Challenge game adds a challenge mode to the famous Sprunki game and activates the game's battle mode. While the 1 Player mode of the game includes the classic mode, in the 2 Player mode you both make music using Sprunki characters and try to reach 2000 by generating scores. You can play the game with your friend in both dark mode and normal mode. If you want, you can also activate different backgrounds.

title: Eat Blobs Simulator
description: The battle of the blobs and slimes is beginning in this great eating simulator. Pick your slime character and start competing against others. Eat smaller blobs and slimes, and make yours bigger than the others. Become the king of the blob arena! Buy various blob skins during the game. On each game, receive various rewards with the blob sizes and coins. Chase smaller blobs and eat them. Collect blobs around and increase your score.

title: Northern Lights - the secret of the forest
description:
A new hit for fans of the Match 3 game genre!

The Scientist Cat is already hiding items throughout the mysterious forest so you can enjoy finding things and earn as many emeralds as possible. The cat is happy to have new guests!

title: Wild Race Master 3d
description: Wild Race Master 3D is an exciting 3D racing game that brings you into a world of extreme speed!In this game, you can experience endless racing fun and drive various cool cars. Challenge the exciting track! ? Drive your beloved racing car through various unique and challenging tracks. You should show excellent driving skills on winding roads and be flexible when dealing with various complex track conditions.

title: Road Race 3d
description: Road Race 3D is an exciting racing game that allows you to ride on a challenging track! You will experience the perfect combination of 3D racing and parkour. Use flexible operation and quick reaction to win every game! To draw a vehicle, a vehicle will randomly appear for you.

title: Pictures Riddle
description:
Guess 1 word based on shown 4 pictures
Discover what word can be related to pictures
Game has 2 modes: “Pictures” & “Riddles”
 
Features:
-     Simple & addictive gameplay
-     Challenging riddles
-     Hundreds of fun levels
-     …



** Credits:
-     Music by “Fred Patry”
-     Menu vector created by upklyak – www.freepik.com

title: Nugget Man Survival Puzzle
description: Are you ready for adventure with the Nugget man character? To save the Nugget Man character who is stranded in the desert, you must fly into the sky without bursting the balloons. You must be careful to take the character to the finish by solving the puzzles before time runs out, accompanied by Gedagedago music. Rescue Nugget Man through desert bandits, cacti and many other challenging obstacles! Enjoy.

title: Word Mine
description: Word Mine takes you on a thrilling journey where letters are your treasure! Dive into a world of scrambled chaos and uncover hidden words buried in the grid. With every move, you’ll strike gold, revealing secrets that push you closer to victory. Sharpen your mind, follow the clues, and let the adventure unfold—one word at a time!

title: Poppy Player Puzzle
description: Solve the riddle of this fun game. In each of the many stages of Poopy Player Puzzle, the small player must use his or her wits to direct the doll to the right keys that will release it from captivity.The goal of the game is to rescue the small doll from Poppy's clutches to progress through the levels, you'll need to keep an eye on the things in the labyrinth; pressing certain buttons may speed up the game or remove hazards.

title: Match Find 3D
description:
Are you a master player of finding games?Do you enjoy matching puzzle games?Come to challenge this addictive puzzle game - Match Find 3D!
Unique gameplay, a combination of collecting and matching, and well-designed levels that will keep you entertained.

title: Transformers Battle For The City
description:
In this game you will find an open world where you will defend the city from the invasion of robots. If you are a fan of transformers, then you will definitely like this game. 
In the game you will find 7 full-fledged story tasks, the complexity of which will gradually increase. After receiving the task, you will go to the place of military operations, where you can use various super-techniques to destroy powerful robot villains.

title: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter
description: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter is a 2D side-scrolling survival RPG shooting game. Zombies occupy the whole city. You need to recruit the last survivors to fight against zombies for a living. As humans, you need weapons, ammo, food, and medicines. Send your teammates to dispatch different buildings, go to complete the tasks in this fallen town. Time is your life, get out of the safe house and find resources!

title: Peg Solitaire
description: Engage your mind with the classic puzzle game, Peg Solitaire. The objective is simple yet challenging: clear the board by jumping pegs over each other until only one peg remains. This timeless game tests your strategic thinking and planning skills, offering various levels of difficulty to keep you entertained.

title: Stickman Miners Wars
description: Lead your stickman king to victory in Stickman Miners Wars, where strategic decision-making is key. Command an army of miners and warriors to build your forces and triumph over opponents. Upgrade your units and yourself as you gain experience, and strategically attack enemy castles while defending your own. Will your strategy lead you to dominance? Play Stickman Miners Wars now!

title: Merge Squares
description: "Merge Squares" is an exciting puzzle game, where your task is to connect squares with same numbers. Using logic and strategic mind, you have to decide how to arrange the squares to combine them into one. Each level gets harder, how far can you go?

title: Data Diggers
description:
Merge USBs, choose blocks, download data, get money,and buy USBs
Merge the USBs for increased efficiency.

Dig Data in Data Diggers, actually you rather download Data with your USBs.
The higher the GB amount of your USB, the faster you can download the data.

title: Panda Running
description: Embark on a thrilling adventure through the bamboo forest in Panda Running, an endless runner game where you guide a cute panda through various obstacles like traps, tree stumps, and boulders. Collect power-ups along the way to protect and boost yourself, experiencing non-stop excitement in this adrenaline-fueled journey.

title: Stickman Warrior Way
description:
Epic battles, complex labyrinths with multiple paths and treacherous enemies await you in the game!

You will have to pass difficult tests in the fight against an ancient evil that wants to destroy all existing worlds.
 Only you can prevent the destruction of the universe and save other worlds from destruction.

18 challenging levels and mazes are waiting for you.
2 or more ways to pass the level
Save this world to give the rest of the universe a chance!

title: Merge Rush Z
description: Merge Rush Z is an addictive free zombie shooter game where you merge powerful guns to battle zombies with your heroine and her squad. Zombies pose a variety of challenges with their size, speed, abilities and powerful bosses! Engage in thrilling firing action, using a combination of guns, deadly items and your wits to clear the zombie waves. Tap, bang and blast your way to survive the Zombie Outbreak!

title: OMG Word Sushi
description: Swipe to connect letters and form words in this sushi-themed word puzzle game. Challenge your vocabulary with over 81 levels and a minimalist cartoon style. Perfect for trivia and quiz enthusiasts. Think it's easy? Try the advanced levels!

title: Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle
description:
Nuts And Bolts Screw Puzzle is a puzzle game to remove bolts from the board, by moving the bolts to other bolt holes. The game will be finished when all the boards are gone
This challenging and addictive Wooden Nuts & Bolts puzzle game will test your problem solving skills as you twist, turn and strategize your way through a maze of tricky Wooden tools. With each level, the puzzles become more complicated and complex.

title: Brain Find Can You Find It
description: Brain Find brings new brain puzzles! Combine brain power and discovery for a brain challenge like no other! You can use your brain and reverse thinking to get the final target item. The unexpected way of passing levels can bring you endless laughs.  The game tests your logical thinking skills, reflexes as well as memory and creativity. Come and experience it and prove that you are the smartest!

title: Stack Battle.io
description:
It is a fun and casual puzzle. In the game, the game screen is fresh and simple, and the cute cartoon style is very eye-catching. The biggest highlight is the addition of tower defense battles to the brick-moving gameplay. The game level is very rich, and the gameplay is very simple. 
You can control the movement of the character by pressing and sliding on the screen.
What the player has to do is to control the character to collect the bricks on the map, stack the bricks and send them to your base. When there are enough bricks, your base will be upgraded and the area will be expanded and the number of tower defenses will be increased. 
When the enemy enters the range of your tower defense, you will be attacked. 
On the contrary, when you enter the range of the enemy tower defense, you will also be attacked. whichever side is attacked and dies first will fail the game, otherwise it will succeed.
Players who like brick-moving games come and download it.

title: Off Road Overdrive
description: Off Road Overdrive plays like a side-scrolling car-balanced game with 2D cartoon vehicles. Let me introduce the game modes for you!If you want to make a perfect record, play Challenge mode with different terrains again and again including Snow, Beachwear, Field, Desert, and Dark Night. Even the 2D platform will test your driving skills and balance abilities!

title: Merge Hospital
description:
Play as Doctor Player in Merge Hospital and discover the many secrets of your staff members, and what is happening in and around the Hospital. In Merge Hospital by Operate Now you will merge and build, meet and love many skilled surgeons, doctors and other interesting characters. You will learn more about their stories and how they got into the hospital.

As Dr. Player you must:
MERGE medical items, pies and much more!
DISCOVER the story of a medical drama like in your favorite TV shows.

title: Hidden Object Great Journey
description: “Hidden Object: Great Journey” is an engaging game that invites players to scour various themed levels for cleverly concealed items. With multiple modes, a lot of challenges, and a treasure trove of objects to find, this game promises endless fun for hidden object enthusiasts. Sharpen your observation skills and embark on a delightful search with every play!

title: Reversi
description: Challenge your strategic mind against the computer in difficulty levels from absolute novice to expert in this classic game of flipping disks.

title: Kick and Ride
description: Kick and Ride is a physics-based puzzle game consisting of two game modes. Drag and drop the block to make path for the soccer as well as for the vehicle. Enjoy the vibrant and colorful beach themed game.

title: Bffs Spring Break Fashionista
description: Welcome to the Bffs Spring Break Fashionista. Spring break is here. Barbie and their friends are can’t wait to have some fun together. They’ve been waiting for the spring break since the beginning of the year. Help them prepare their spring break outfits! They can finally wear skirts and dresses since it’s really warm outside now, so make sure to create a cute look! Have fun!

title: Over the Rainbow
description: Help Alex the Elf return the colors to the rainbow by jumping. Avoid enemies and find power ups to aid you in your quest.

title: Dreamy Jewel
description: If you put three or more jewel of thesame type together vertically or horizontally, they'll disappear! Special blocks appear when four or more are aligned and erased. Mixing effects when special blocks are crossed with each other!

title: Passenger Sort
description: Play Passenger Sort free online and take control in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Guide travelers to the right buses, planes, and trains in a clever logic puzzle that works as a fun brain game for all ages. This unblocked game runs smoothly at school or home and is perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for smart sorting challenges anytime.

title: Drunk Man 3D
description: Drunk Man 3D is a challenging and comedic 3D Ragdoll Physics game. In this game, players must navigate a treacherous cityscape while emulating the hindered balance of inebriation. The game features ragdoll physics, where even minor collisions can cause players to lose control and stumble.

title: Food Card Sort
description: Food Card Sort is a unique and challenging 3D puzzle game that tests players' logic and reasoning skills. With a variety of food cards, each card displaying a different type of food, players must categorize them by placing similar foods together on the corresponding plate to pass each level.

title: Cube Stack 2048
description:
Cube Stack 2048 is a highly addictive casual game inspired by the classic puzzle game 2048, but with exciting new gameplay!
Merge numbered cubes to double their value, reach 2048, or even higher! Try to make it to the end.
Explore tons of amazing and challenging levels by merging cubes, avoiding obstacles, and collecting money!

title: Mirrors - Puzzle
description: Challenge your mind with Mirrors - Puzzle! In this captivating HTML5 puzzle game, your goal is to connect light dots by reflecting beams of light using mirrors. Strategically place and rotate mirrors to guide the light across the board, linking the dots to complete each level. As you progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring careful planning and problem-solving skills. With its minimalist design and engaging gameplay, Mirrors - Puzzle offers endless brain-teasing fun on any device.

title: Turbo Stars
description:
Hop on your skateboard and speed down the track in this wild and fast-paced racing game!

Zoom through a wide variety of exhilarating tracks and defeat your opponents!

Think fast to pick up items that will help you gain an advantage — or even pick up and throw your competitors if they get too close to you! 

Don’t forget to snatch coins and keys to unlock a whole bunch of awesome items, including power-ups, new objects to ride on, and gear for your character.

title: Griddlers Deluxe
description: Welcome to Griddlers Deluxe! Immerse yourself in a world of captivating puzzles. Uncover hidden images by deciphering numerical clues on the grid. With almost 200 challenges, Griddlers Deluxe offers addictive brain-teasing fun. Ready to decode the mysteries? Play now!

title: Chill Girl Clicker
description: Chill Girl Clicker is a soothing, laid-back clicker game that’s perfect for unwinding and finding your zen. Just like its predecessor, Chill Girl Clicker, this game offers a serene and calming experience, but with a delightful twist: a charming girl as the main character, bringing a fresh and enchanting vibe to your screen.

title: Super Sprunki Clicker
description: Enjoy the Sprunki World in this clicker idle game. Immerse yourself in the beats and music simulation, create the band, and use the rewards to buy new upgrades and features. Break the screen touching the sprunkis, hire automatic clickers, social media features, instruments, and everything to become the Sprunki King.

title: Office Brawl - Room Smash
description:
Become the hero of an office rebellion and destroy everything in your path! The player will have to transform into a disgruntled employee who challenges the system, destroys obstacles and fights the boss.

Use brute force and ingenuity to get through difficult tests, participate in intense battles and explosive actions.
Become an antihero and sow chaos from start to finish!

title: Color Nonogram Puzzle
description: Play Color Nonogram free online and uncover hidden pictures in a relaxing browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Solve each grid using logic clues in a satisfying logic puzzle that doubles as a focused brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game made for calm thinking and colorful puzzle fun anytime.

title: Parking Master Urban Challenges
description:
A realistic 3D parking simulator where you can hone your driving skills and become a real parking master!
Get behind the wheel of realistic cars of different sizes and maneuver through crowded city streets, parking in the most difficult places.
Pass all the tests, become a parking master and prove that you can do any maneuver!

title: Resident Evil: Purge Operation
description: At the start of each level, players must quickly locate powerful weapons like the shotgun and sniper rifle, crucial for fending off hordes of zombies. Once the eerie alarm sounds, grotesque, ferocious undead flood the area. A single mistake can lead to being swarmed, so precise marksmanship, agile movement, and calm judgment are essential for survival.​

title: Robby: Bomberman
description:
Dive into an exciting adventure with Robby, a brave hero who finds himself trapped in a labyrinth filled with ghosts and mysterious loot boxes. In this danger-filled world, to unlock the exit, Robby must defeat all the ghosts and destroy the crates, which may contain precious coins and useful bonuses.

But Robby is not alone in his fight! He has a loyal ally—a magical mushroom that can emerge from the loot boxes to assist him in battles against the ghosts.

title: Space Raider
description: Blast your way through the galaxy in intense battles. Enjoy beautiful graphic and exciting gameplay with tons of enemies as customizable ships.

title: Hostage Fishes
description: A malfunction occurred in the aquarium filter pipes. The fish in the aquarium are in a very difficult situation. If you do not repair all the pipes within 1 minute, you may cause them to disappear.  You should fix the pipes as soon as possible to solve the problem.

title: Toca Avatar My Hospital
description: The hospital in the town has received many patients. Come to the town medical center with doctors to treat the patients! You need to use equipment to examine the patient, determine the cause, and administer treatment. Just choose your favorite role and drag them to different consulting rooms to treat them.

title: Portal Master
description: Help Stickman in the fight against villains! Arrange the magic portals so that the bullet returns to the villain. Become a Portal Master superhero!

title: Code Runner: Binary Confusion
description: A fast-paced binary runner where logic and reflexes collide. Match the rule, dodge the wrong digit — survive the code! .A psychological runner puzzle where every second counts and one rule could change everything.

title: Math Crossword Puzzle - Genius Edition
description: Challenge your brain with Math Crossword, the perfect mix of logic puzzles and number games! Solve clever math equations in a crossword-style grid by placing the correct numbers into the right spots. Each level sharpens your brain with fun and rewarding challenges that test your addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division skills.

title: Hammer Master－Craft & Destroy!
description: Do you want to relax and smash everything you see with a huge hammer? In this free casual 3D game we have successfully combined the mechanics of merging, crafting weapons, destroying objects, etc. Click "Play" & relieve your stress by breaking all around!

title: Huggy Wuggy Escape
description: Huggy Wuggy Escape is a Poppy Playtime inspired fangame where you have to do 4 simple things in order to win: Find a gun, find some bullets, shoot down Huggy Wuggy and leave the factory before it explode. To kill Huggy you have to shoot him at least six times, but the bullets are rare, so you have to move around the complex looking for them. If Huggy catch you is game over. Once you shot him down, you have to reach the exit in less than 30 seconds.

title: Archer Go
description: Endless arrows, endless fun! Get ready for a thrilling endless game that will put your archery skills to the test. Travel through a fantastic landscape with your bow, aiming at targets along the way. Keep playing, earn points and unlock exciting customization options.

title: Stickman battle 1-4 Players
description:
Cool collection of dynamic action games!

Fight with rotating weapons, score goals in football, Take first place in a long race, Complete difficult survival levels and much more.

There is a quick round for a couple of minutes and a tournament for several rounds.

You can play up to 4 players, play with friends and bots.
You can change the player's appearance: change cars, faces, color.

Play and have a lot of fun!

title: Stickman Troll Thief Puzzle
description: Thief Puzzle is a funny and addictive casual puzzle game. Here you should help a clever stickman with many funny ways to solve puzzles and steal target items. The rich and varied game scene contains many unexpected obstacles and traps, testing your intelligence and logical thinking. Each level of the game is a unique challenge. To make flexible movements of the character to overcome obstacles, avoid enemies, and successfully steal the target item.

title: Elevator Fight
description: Make your way to the top floor, one fight at a time. Every level, a new challenger steps in, but only one can ride up! With simple controls and over 130 levels, this game offers quick, close-quarters combat in a cramped elevator. Upgrade your fighter’s speed, power, and defense to keep up with the ever-changing, humorous opponents. What’s waiting at the top?

title: Flick 'n Bounce
description: Tap to bounce enemies, use powerful props, and survive in this fast-paced stickman battle! Don't let enemies get close—bounce them all away and master the chaos! Ready for the challenge?

title: Jump Ball Classic
description: Jump Ball Classic is the best game to test your reflexes. Move your ball left and right to avoid obstacles and enjoy the thrilling moment! Once it hits, it will fail immediately. Concentrate and challenge for success!

title: Last Day On Earth Survival
description: Last Day on Earth: Survival is a 2D survival simulation game. In this large ruined city, you have 51 locations to discover. When you collect some wood and metal, you can make weapons on the Workbench. When you win enough experience and level up, you can check your Attribute and upgrade HP, ATK, Speed, and Search. In the day, explore and go to places you have never visited. I hope you will survive 50 days and explore all 51 locations.

title: Solitaire Farm Seasons 4
description: Solitaire Farm: Seasons 4 is here with over 3,800+ levels and fresh adventures! Explore beautiful new maps like Greenland, South Korea, Sumatra, and Nepal while growing unique crops such as Mountain Avens, Ginkgo, Durian, Flax, and Orchids. With new level packs, seasonal events, and charming visuals, this relaxing solitaire journey is more exciting than ever. Ready to train your brain and enjoy country life? Dive into the adventure now!

title: NG: Flow Lines
description: Flow Lines is an engaging and straightforward puzzle game where the main objective is to connect dots of the same color through a continuous path on a grid.

title: Merge 3D - Match 3 Balloons
description: Your goal is to help the house, floating in the sky on a variety of colorful balloons of different shapes, to land on the ground. Clicking on the balls, you move them to the cells at the bottom of the screen. Collect three identical ball objects in a row to make them disappear, freeing up space and bringing the house closer to the ground. Grandpa is sitting on the roof, and when the house finally lands, he will be happy to celebrate the victory!

title: Tiles of the Unexpected 2
description:
Tiles of the Unexpected 2 is a puzzle game with a dark military theme and refined gameplay. Clear groups of tiles, set off chain reactions, and plan each move carefully as the board shifts and collapses. The classic mechanics from Tiles of the Unexpected return with smoother controls and a sharper, more intense style.

The game introduces a new Time Attack mode, where speed and strategy are key. Clear tiles quickly to push back enemy forces and survive as long as possible.

title: Colors&Forms
description:
Dynamic and exciting!
Choose the game mode!
Complete missions and pass all levels!
Levels differ in color palettes and falling elements.
Interact with the objects appearing on the game screen, which complicate the process of the game.
After accumulating enough pieces, unlock the game type “Infinity”!
Choose your favorite level and accumulate as many pieces as possible to beat your opponents!

title: Wordler
description:
It's the same English word guessing game as Hackman I played when I was young.
You are given six chances to guess a word that consists of only five letters.
How many times can you get it right?

title: Bubble Shooter Temple Jewels
description: Embark on a temple adventure in Bubble Shooter Temple Jewels! Pop colorful bubbles as you progress through ancient ruins inspired by Central American temples. Keep track of your journey with the Stats screen, showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With vibrant visuals, exciting challenges, and detailed progress tracking, this bubble shooter keeps you motivated to aim higher and improve every round!

title: Black Pink Christmas Concert
description: If you’re a fan of Black Pink, the Black Pink Christmas Concert Dress Up game is perfect for you. This game lets you style the members of Black Pink for their exciting holiday concert. Whether you’re a Black Pink fan or love fashion, this game offers endless styling options. Celebrate the magic of Christmas while showing off your creativity.

title: Craft Man Vs Giant TNT
description: Are you ready to enter a crazy world full of giants and TNT? Craftsman vs Giant TNT is an exciting Minecraft-style game that challenges your creativity, strategy and courage. Play as a brave craftsman in a dangerous world. Choose between two different modes: Destroy TNT or City TNT. Build fortifications and use weapons to repel giant enemies.

title: Age of Apes Run
description: Welcome to the wildest adventure of the ape era! Age of Apes Run is a fun platform running game. It is full of puzzles and nervous battles. Perfect for every arcade-loving boy out there! You'll be a brave ape warrior and run through a platform full of obstacles! Collect many bananas to boost your skills.

title: Poopy Escape The Prison
description: Help Poopy, a mischievous (and slightly stinky) inmate, break out of a maximum-security prison! Navigate through hazardous cells, evade ruthless guards, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden paths to escape. But beware—one wrong move, and Poopy lands in solitary confinement!

title: Timewalker: Survive!
description: Time Walker: Survive – Embark on a thrilling journey through apocalyptic landscapes in this fast-paced 2D top-down survival game! As a Timewalker, battle relentless hordes of zombies across different eras, fighting for survival against increasingly intense waves of the undead.

title: Crazy Screw King
description: This is Unscrew All! More than simple matching, swiftly remove screws into same-colored bins. Glass slides down with each success! Release stress, show skill, become the Screw Master!

title: Sprunki Monster Music Beats
description: Sprunki Monster Music Beats is a music game where popular characters create unique compositions. Combine sounds, create melodies, and enjoy!

title: Make Two
description:
In Make Two, your job is simple. Give each customer two of the same food! Drag the matching items to the hungry customers before time runs out.

- Beat the clock to clear each level
- Match food pairs to fulfill orders
- Earn coins for every satisfied customer. The more you serve, the more you earn!
- Use your coins to unlock new cute customers.

Fast-paced, satisfying, and easy to pick up. Make Two is the perfect bite-sized game to test your reflexes and memory.

title: Prásino
description: Prasino is a free-to-play forest adventure game that combines exploration, survival, and environmental restoration. As nature’s last hope, your mission is to travel through beautiful landscapes, collect magical seeds, and revive the forest by planting trees. Along the way, you must watch out for dangerous enemies and manage your breath carefully to keep exploring deeper into the wild.

title: Snowflight
description: In this game, you control the flight of a bird, exploring snowy landscapes and enjoying the winter atmosphere. Various game modes await you: explore the world, search for hidden items, and take part in thrilling competitions. Each mode offers unique challenges, allowing you to test yourself in different aspects of the game and create unforgettable experiences.

title: Mustang City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate realistic traffic and monitor your fuel while exploring busy streets. Enjoy stunning night city graphics, transforming the city into a neon-lit spectacle. Pedestrians add unpredictability, and hitting them triggers police chases. Customize your car's appearance and performance. All this chaos is accompanied by your cute dog. Collect all the tiles by matching their pairs according to the rules of classic Mahjong. Immerse yourself in Mahjong's unique world and dive into this captivating puzzle's depths!

title: Match Masters
description: Match Masters is a real-time multiplayer match-3 puzzle game where players compete head-to-head on the same board. Each move requires strategic thinking, as it can benefit both you and your opponent. Utilize unique boosters, participate in tournaments, and climb the global leaderboards in this dynamic and engaging game.

title: Guivo.io
description:
Challenge the world in Guivo.io, a skill-based Match-3 battle arena playable instantly in your browser! Match pieces, shatter ice and outscore opponents in lightning-fast 2-minute rounds.
Climb our chess-inspired Elo ranking system based solely on skill, earn Trophies with each victory and see your name showcased in the winner's banner. Ready to prove you're the puzzle master?

title: V And N Pizza Cooking Game
description: Experience the ultimate virtual pizza-making adventure with the V And N Pizza Cooking Game! Craft delicious pizzas from scratch, choose mouthwatering toppings, and master the art of baking. From classic favorites to innovative creations, unleash your inner chef and create culinary masterpieces.

title: Link Flow
description: Enter the mesmerizing world of Link Flow, where logic meets creativity in a captivating puzzle experience! In this minimalist yet visually stunning game, your goal is simple: connect the dots with seamless lines, recreating intricate patterns that test your problem-solving skills.

title: Minecraft Pixel Warfare
description: Minecraft Pixel Warfare" is a fast-paced PvP shooter set in blocky, Minecraft-inspired worlds. Players battle in competitive team modes (e.g., Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag) or free-for-all arenas using guns, grenades, and melee weapons—all with Minecraft’s iconic pixelated visuals. Unlock skins, upgrade weapons, and master maps to dominate the leaderboard!

title: Tung Tung Sahur in Geometry Dash
description: Join Tung Tung Sahur, the wooden drum-carrying dawn caller, as he bounces and flips through a neon cityscape just before sunrise! Dodge spikes, leap over traps, and time your jumps to the beat of his signature “tung-tung!” calls. In this Geometry Dash–inspired challenge, the streets are alive with glowing gates, speed pads, and tricky gravity flips. Can you drum your way to the end without missing a beat?

title: Dead Zone Mech Ops
description:
Dead Zone: Mech Ops thrusts players into the heart of a scorched Earth ravaged by endless war, where autonomous factions and rogue AI compete for control over the planet’s last remaining strongholds. You are a combat pilot in the elite “Mech Ops” unit — the final line of defense in a world on the brink of total collapse.
Players will command next-gen combat exosuits equipped with modular weapon systems, advanced targeting tech, and adaptive armor that reacts to battlefield conditions.

title: Witchy and the Puzzle Adventures
description: Help the brave Witch to pass all the puzzling tests and find all the seals to shelter them in her cozy forest house. Kittens are lost in the forest, which is full of various traps and dangers, you need to help the Witch to pass all the tests and find all the seals.

title: My horse is amazing
description:
Ride a horse and overcome obstacles: fences, pits and water obstacles. Control the jumps — tap and release to jump accurately.

Collect powerups with powerups — increase attack and health. The further you run, the stronger your horse becomes!

Your steed is growing: it's getting faster and more powerful. Upgrade it and keep running. At the end of each level is a boss battle! Show what you are capable of!

title: Onet Mahjong Connect
description: Onet Mahjong Connect is an easy and fun puzzle game where players match identical tiles. The goal is to connect two matching tiles. Tiles can be linked if they can be joined using three or fewer straight lines. With many levels to enjoy, the game offers a relaxing and engaging experience — perfect for taking a break and sharpening your mind!

title: Block Stacking
description: Block Stacking is a very fun, leisure, and pressure-relieving game. The game is very delicate and fresh. In the game, you will play by combining many different fruits. As long as you can complete the target tasks, you will have a chance to get rewards! By eliminating the fruits on the screen, you can successfully pass the level. It's extremely easy to operate, which makes you feel very addicted. Come and try the game!

title: Mermaidcore Makeup
description: In Mermaidcore Makeup, you ladies can step into the shoes of a talented makeup artist and work your magic on three stunning ladies. Journey into the realm of fantasy as you help these beauties achieve their perfect, enchanting looks. Prepare for a sensational trip filled with endless options as you explore an extensive selection of hairstyles, eyeshadows, mascara, lipsticks, face patterns, and intricate shoulder and neck patterns that perfectly match each girl's unique style and personality.

title: Swat Force Vs Terrorists
description: Swat Force Vs Terrorists is an intense tactical shooter where players take on the role of elite SWAT team members engaging in high-stakes confrontations with terrorists. The game emphasizes teamwork and tactical coordination, requiring players to utilize professional counter-terrorism skills and equipment across various complex urban environments.

title: Car Stunt Racing 3D
description: Car Stunt Racing 3D is a fun racing game. Open this incredibly entertaining car racing mobile game and prepare yourself to engage in all kinds of thrilling races. Place your fingers on the ground and get ready for the unexpected. You will never know what you will encounter when making your next turn. Collect energy and money, evade opponents, and join us to experience the thrill of speed and excitement! We wish you a joyful gameplay experience!

title: Flight Sim Air Traffic control
description: Flight Sim is a game where you have to guide aircraft to their landing zones, keep the skies safe to complete the levels to get high score.

title: Earwax Clinic
description: Welcome to Earwax Clinic, where you will be the best ear-cleaning expert! In this fun and relaxing 3D simulation game, you'll dive into the world of earwax removal. Help patients remove those annoying earwax. Pay attention to making their comfort and satisfaction!

title: Help The Duck
description:
Helping Little Duck
In this Skill Game help a charming little duckling to fall into the tub with water. Throw the water in the correct places so that the duckling falls directly into the tub. - Play Helping Little Duck Free and Enjoy!

title: Galaxy Carnage
description: Battle in space with countless enemies and their bosses coming in waves. Lots of weapons, lots of lasers, lots of explosions and effects. Upgrade the starship to the most powerful machine for exterminating alien invaders.

title: DuaLight - A Reflected Game
description:
DuaLight is a challenging 2D pixel art hyper-casual platformer. The true path lies in the reflection. 

Navigate levels where the real world tricks your eyes, and only those who watch the reflection below can move forward. Minimalist and short.

In DuaLight – A Reflected Game, nothing is as it seems… or rather, everything only appears in the reflection. You control a character in a world where invisible platforms can’t be seen in the real world, but only in the reflection below the screen.

title: Save the Daddy
description:
Get ready to unlock a world of tricky puzzles and brain teasers in Save the Daddy. Each level is unique and carefully designed to challenge your mind and test your IQ. Pull the pin in the right order and help the man escape from dangerous monsters & obstacles safely and thoughtfully.
Play each level very cautiously by analyzing your move before pulling the pin. As you progress, levels increase in difficulty which will make you game challenging and earn more rewards.

title: Graduation Makeup Trends
description: Discover the latest makeup trends with our Graduation Makeup Trends game! From bold and fierce to soft and elegant, this game offers a variety of makeup options to suit your style. We bring 3 BFFs, each with a unique style, many makeup options, stunning dresses, and accessories for your inspiration. Mixed with floral printed dresses, golden jewelry, and holographic accessories, in the Graduation Makeup Trends game, you will find everything you need to help these girls make a statement.

title: That's My Seat Logic Puzzle
description: Who took my seat? Welcome to the brain-teasing logic puzzle game - That’s My Seat - Logic Puzzle. In this fun and casual game, your mission is to help each quirky character find their perfect seat. Some want to sit by the window, others hate noise, and some need distance from others. Your job is to match everyone’s preferences and place them just right! Each level is a unique puzzle that requires smart seating arrangements.

title: Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up
description: In Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up, you get to explore a vibrant underwater world where two playful dolphins are ready to get glammed up! This charming dress-up game lets you choose outfits, accessories, and fun props to create a stylish underwater look for both dolphins.

title: Block Pixels
description:
Block Pixels is a vibrant puzzle game where classic block-clearing action meets the creative joy of pixel art discovery.

Your main goal is to strategically place colorful pieces to clear lines on the board. But the real magic lies in what you clear. Each block you eliminate contributes to a larger masterpiece. Clearing specific colors helps you build and reveal dozens of charming hidden images, from cute animals to fun objects.

title: NoobHood HalloweenCraft
description: Noobhood is actually a folk hero. Of course, that's how he is in our game too. He has one main goal: to dress in a Halloween costume, prepare his horse for Halloween, and collect all the Halloween coins. Gather all the Halloween coins. You must be very careful; surviving in this dark and scary forest is truly difficult. There are pumpkin monsters in this forest, and you must defeat them with your sword. Throw your sword at the monsters to defeat them all.

title: LABUBU MERGE CLICKER
description:
Enter the wacky world of Labubu and the Monster Crew — merge mischievous Labubus, unlock rare forms, and climb your way to the top!
Boom! Crash! Roar! The gang’s all here — how far can you go before the box overflows?

title: Antistress Relaxation Box
description: Antistress - Relaxation Box is a fun casual game. Have you long been upset with some people in your life? He may be your date or a relative, and this game will vent your dissatisfaction! Choose a character and a tool for hitting, and your task is to beat the blood bar to 0 in a limited time. Easy to pick up, but informative and will give you hours of entertainment. Relax yourself and have fun!

title: Ultimate Sports Car Drift
description: Dive into the world of Ultimate Sports Car Drift and feel the rush of adrenaline as you take on the ultimate drifting challenges. Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newcomer to the world of drift racing, this game offers something for everyone. Buckle up, hit the gas, and let the drifting madness begin!

title: Wacky Wheels
description:
? Wacky Wheels – Drift, Dodge & Dominate!
Master the chaos in Wacky Wheels, the ultimate test of timing and control!
Navigate wild tracks, drift through tight turns, dodge massive hammers, and collect stars — all before the clock runs out. Each level brings new challenges, themes, and physics that’ll keep you on the edge of your seat.

? It’s not just a race — it’s a wacky adventure of skill and speed!

title: Charger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle car through an expansive night city map! Customize and upgrade your muscle car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 4 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: World Solitaire -Tripeaks-
description:
It is TriPeaks, one of the most famous solitaires in the world.
Take a step to go up and test your brain and luck
How far can I clean it?

title: Bone Doctor Shoulder Case
description: Oouch, our cheerleader took a tumble and hurt her shoulder. Help fix her up with a quick shoulder surgery by following the right steps to ensure she recovers fully. Once she healed, give her a make over with some stylish outfits and accessories from our collection, so she can return to the squad looking better than ever!

title: Pop Culture Halloween Makeup
description: Immerse yourself in Pop Culture Halloween Makeup, where you can transform into your favorite icons. With a wide array of hairstyles, eyeshadows, mascaras, lipsticks, neck paint, tops, and accessories, you can create stunning Halloween makeup looks that will leave everyone in awe. Unleash your imagination, experiment with different styles, and become the ultimate makeup artist. Tap into the spirit of Halloween and play Pop Culture Halloween Makeup now to embark on a spooktacular journey!

title: Komaru cat
description:
Take care of Komaru the cat! Pet her, feed her, bathe her, and tuck her in for sleep!
Dress her up in stylish looks! Hats, glasses, collars, new fur colors, and more! Experiment and create your own unique cat!
Play the merge mini-game, compete on the leaderboard, and earn coins!
Watch the best video memes with funny moments from her life!
Complete the daily challenges and come back tomorrow, Komaru will miss you!
Try to unlock all achievements! Come and have fun!

title: Butterfly Kyodai Rainbow
description: Play Butterfly Kyodai Rainbow – a relaxing and colorful butterfly-matching puzzle game with fresh mechanics and vibrant rainbow visuals! Enjoy hundreds of exciting levels, earn daily rewards, take part in special events, and unlock beautiful new wings. A fun Mahjong-style connect game for all ages – no download required!

title: Leap and Avoid 2
description: Get ready for another thrilling journey with the white ball! "Leap and Avoid 2" brings new caves, lab levels, and fresh mechanics. Discover secret paths, collect coins, and unlock powerful bonuses like speed boosts and shields. Jump on white platforms, avoid black ones, and explore in all directions to find exits. The more coins you gather, the higher you rank. Compete with friends and uncover every hidden treasure!

title: Digit Shooter
description: Digit Shooter! plays like a vertical-version shooting running arcade game. With 3D green numbers, you can launch green numbers to shoot green numbers and numbered walls. You can shoot them and collect them to make your number bigger. Don't waste bullets and time on red walls while avoiding them. When you reach the finish line, try to focus on one line to shoot, then you will collect more rewards

title: Mobile Phone Case Diy
description: This is a mobile phone case game that was designed. Have you ever wanted to create a fashion phone case of your own? In the game, you can show your creativity, enjoy the art of customisation and see your phone evolve the way you like. You can choose your favourite colours, draw, mix, and spray paint your phone case.

title: Sudo Tetroid Daily
description: A new fresh way of playing your favorite sudoku puzzles have just arrived! Play your way through all levels or challenge yourself in the daily mode! Come back everyday for new challenges!

title: Imposter Coloring Book
description: Get ready for a colorful twist on the mystery and excitement of the Imposter Coloring Book! Inspired by the thrilling world of imposters, this coloring app lets you bring your favorite characters to life with vibrant colors and unique brush styles. Choose from various brushes, including pastel, watercolor, and pencil, to add a unique touch to each crewmate, imposter, and spaceship scene. Whether you prefer bold colors or a soft pastel look, every coloring page is yours to make unique.

title: Spin Shot Siege
description: In "Spin Shot Siege," take control of a gunner on a rotating tower. Enemy tanks orbit around you in the opposite direction. Each level has tanks following paths like diamonds, circles, rectangles, or triangles. Aim carefully and destroy all tanks before running out of ammo. Can you master the spin and win the siege?

title: Knit Bears
description: Knit Bears is a cozy and colorful puzzle game where you help adorable teddy bears come to life by knitting them from soft yarn. Choose a bear, place it in the center, and matching yarn balls will start wrapping it up. Each teddy bear needs three yarns to be fully knitted, so plan your moves carefully. If the board fills with unfinished bears that can’t be completed, the game ends.

title: COINs
description: A line of 10 coins with the same number changes to a coin with one higher number. Coins can be moved anywhere, even to empty lines or on coins with different numbers. You can add coins at any time. The game is cleared if you make a coin with the number 10! The faster the clear time, the higher the score.

title: Crazy Motorcycle
description:
Drive Nubik along exciting tracks. Jump over gaps, go around obstacles and reach the finish line! Lots of different levels, drive a motorcycle, get there without destruction.

You have to drive a motorcycle with a noob and get to the finish line.
Jump over gaps and go around obstacles at high speed.
Exciting levels are waiting for you!

title: Zombie Defense: War
description: Progress through the different environments and defend the last sanctuaries of humanity! Merge your towers and use boosters to bolster your chance of success.

title: Real Driving Simulator
description: Real Driving Simulator is a realistic driving simulation game that lets you fully enjoy the thrill of driving and racing! In this game, you can unblock various vehicles and drive them through cities and tracks. Experience the real feel of being behind the wheel.

title: Traitor Beaver!
description: Beaver Traitor! An exciting game where one player takes on the role of the traitor, while the other players act as regular participants. Your goal as the traitor is to secretly kill all the other players, sabotaging their tasks at the nuclear power plant. You'll need to be cunning, careful, and think strategically to avoid detection and achieve victory. Use various tactics and deception to reach your goals.

title: Mecha Duel
description:
Crazy about robot fighting games? Wanna fight robots on the mech arena? This Mecha Duel game will not let you down. Your robot has to defeat real steel enemies in a mech arena. It’s hard to survive.
Upgrade your hero to defeat war robots. Unleash fighting attacks in one-on-one robot battle with simple gameplay.

title: Screw Jam - Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Remove screws in correct order to get rid of the boards. 
Match the removed screws and complete the level. 
Test yourself with this amazing brain teaser!

title: Epic Hero Quest Idle RPG
description:
Conquer enemies, level up heroes, unlock skills in Epic Hero Quest: Idle RPG!

- Battle Through Hordes of Enemies
- Earn Gold and Level Up
- Unlock and Upgrade Skills

Are you ready to embark on the ultimate adventure? 
Join the quest  and become the legendary hero you were destined to be in Epic Hero Quest: Idle RPG!

title: Golden Frontier
description: This simulation game takes you on a Wild West adventure. Mine and manage resources, grow crops and craft goods as you aim to build a thriving city in the frontier lands. Invite friends to become your neighbors to trade and co-op, and progress quicker. Hunt for gold, unlock new locations, and discover secrets as the story unfolds. Meet a colorful cast of characters, including trappers, Indians and criminals.

title: Stickman Prison Escape
description: Stickman went back to prison for committing a minor crime. It's time to find a successful way to escape from this cold, gray prison. Guards and other difficulties await you along the way. There will be a choice of 3 items that the guard brought hidden in the pumpkin. It's Halloween time and pumpkin will help Stickman successfully escape prison.

title: Vibrant Hearts Glamour vs Punk
description: Two best girlfriends, Lily and Roxana, are striking opposites. Lily is the personification of tenderness and romance, dressed in airy pink dresses decorated with sequins and floral patterns. Roxanne is the true queen of punk rock, with her black leather dresses, gothic earrings and bold hairstyles. But do not forget about the third girlfriend, Melody, who masterfully combines both styles. Players will be able to experiment with outfits and choose which one is best suited for Valentine's Day!

title: Police Car Line Driving
description: Police Car Line Driving is a cool and addictive 3D car-avoiding arcade game. You have to chase unauthorized vehicles and drive as far as you can for higher score records. Each vehicle will give you an extra 100 scores right away. You have to dodge the bombs, other vehicles will do the same. If you hit them, you will lose the game immediately. Your current score and best score will be shown on the settlement page. If you want to improve your current score, you can restart and try again.

title: Fast Lap
description: Experience the thrill of high-speed racing with a simple yet challenging touch-controlled game. Navigate a twisting track as you balance speed and control. Accelerate on straightaways, but be careful! Take curves too fast and you'll spin out. Master the art of timing to become the ultimate racer.

title: Tap Gallery
description:
Tap Gallery is the ultimate puzzle game where you test your brain and tap away blocks to uncover hidden images. 
This iq game challenges your logical thinking and provides satisfying puzzle-solving experiences that relieve anxiety. 
Each tap puzzle is a unique brain teaser designed to engage and entertain, making it one of the most addicting games in the puzzle genre.

title: Blocks Breaker
description:
Shoot Blocks break Blocks, upgrade your the tiny car to make it shoot faster to break more blocks!!!


Get coins with every block you break!

title: Real Racing 3D
description: Immerse yourself in exciting racing! Play classic cars - step on the gas and win! Win championships and unlock new cars!

title: Cube Stories: Escape
description:
Immerse yourself in a fascinating plot and follow a brave video blogger who bravely goes into the dark embrace of an abandoned mansion. As you make your way through each carefully designed room, you'll encounter a series of cryptic puzzles and mind-bending challenges that will test your intelligence, observation, and creative thinking.
As the plot develops, you will be plunged into the darkness of the house's past and the mysterious history of its former inhabitants.

title: Tile Sort - Match 3
description: Tile Sort - Match 3 is an addictive match-3 puzzle game where your task is to sort and match identical tiles on the board. The game combines classic match-3 gameplay with elements of sorting, adding an extra layer of strategy and logic. Move tiles, creating combinations of three or more identical tiles to clear the board.

title: Block Digger
description: Dig, Click, and Get Rich! In Block Digger, every tap brings you closer to fortune! Smash stones, collect coins and crystals, and upgrade your mine to skyrocket your earnings. Unlock new mines, chase achievements, and build your mining empire. It's easy, fun, and totally addictive—start digging today! ⛏️

title: Monster School 2
description: Monsters from minecraft are trained at the monster school by Herobrin's teacher. Take the tests, find out who is a Noob and who is a real pro in Bottle Flip challenge, parkour and roller coaster!

title: Russian Treasure Hunter
description: You're a prospector in a big mining town: grab your device, head to a location, and search for hidden items. As your device's signal grows, you're near a treasure trove; dig up a find and take it back to town to sell. The game combines tactical exploration, economics, and collecting: clever backpack management, purchasing upgrades, and choosing the right moment to return to town determine whether you'll make a profit or leave empty-handed.

title: Battle Arena Race to Win
description: Battle Arena Race to Win is a high-octane arena game where you join the Red or Blue team and engage in fierce car battles. Choose from a variety of cars, collect and upgrade them to dominate the arena. Balance speed, durability, and acceleration to outmaneuver opponents. Equip your car with strategic items, upgrade for success, and climb the leaderboard to lead your team to victory!

title: Traffic Tap Puzzle
description: Traffic Tap Puzzle is a challenging puzzle game where players must control traffic at intersections by tapping on cars to start or stop them. The goal is to avoid collisions while ensuring a smooth flow of vehicles. As the levels progress, traffic becomes more complex, requiring strategic timing and quick decision-making. With engaging mechanics and increasing difficulty, the game tests your reflexes and planning skills.

title: GT Drift Most Wanted
description:
Drift your way around each level and hit all the snow piles while avoiding barriers. With responsive controls and a focus on timing and precision, players must master their drifting skills to clear each stage and become the ultimate Drift Master.
In this game, players can purchase different cars, each offering a unique driving experience. There’s no customization—just pick your favorite car and hit the track!

title: Ellie Chinese New Year Celebration
description: Celebrate the beauty and traditions of the Chinese New Year with Ellie in this fun and engaging game! Known as the Lunar New Year, this festival is marked by vibrant decorations, delicious food, and exciting cultural customs. Join Ellie as she prepares for the celebration by dressing up in stunning traditional outfits, decorating her space, and participating in festive activities.

title: My Perfect Organization
description: Searching for relaxing casual games? Want to get a pastime challenge and leisure? Why dont you try this mini games collection-Home Packing! Here you will find ten more different kinds little puzzles full of packing fun, each has its own packing charm. No more brain teasers, just enjoy the fun of puzzle solving! Organize the whole house with your own hand, create a tidy life through organizing games and sorting games!

title: Grass Land
description: Grass Land is a vibrant exploration game that drops you into a sprawling world of thick greenery and hidden surprises. Take control of your grass cutter, uncover valuable resources beneath the overgrowth, and build up your base as you roam the fields. Stay sharp, move fast, and make the most of every patch of grass you find.

title: Darling Doll
description: Darling Doll is the ultimate paper doll DIY game that offers a perfect blend of character creation and dress-up game. With a vast collection of outfits, accessories, and hairstyles, you can unleash your creativity and design unique avatars that reflect your personal style. Whether you prefer chibi dolls or glamorous fashion dolls, Darling Doll has got you covered.

title: Connect Image
description: Play an exciting puzzle game about rainbow friends and other characters! You just need to assemble a picture of the parts.The game is similar to both puzzles and games in the style of "dop". Use logic, turn on your brains, pump attention and ingenuity!

title: Match Collection
description: Collect 3 of the same items from the shelf to erase them. When a shelf is empty, the shelf above it falls down. You can have up to 7 items, and when your hand is full, the game is over. When all items are erased, the stage is cleared.

title: Kitty Squad Winter Dress Up
description: Step into the adorable world of Kitty Squad Winter Dress Up, where you can style your kitty for the winter season! Choose from cozy outfits, cute accessories, and festive winter gear to create the perfect look for your furry friend. With its charming graphics and endless customization options, this game is perfect for fashion lovers and cat enthusiasts alike. Start dressing up your kitty today!

title: Back 2 School Makeover
description: Embrace the nostalgia and dive into our Back 2 School Makeover game, where you can fashionably express yourself, experiment with stunning looks, and relish into the feeling of heading back to school with style! Embark on a fabulous journey with our character, Amelia, as she transforms from an edgy e-girl to a chic, school-ready fashionista. Revamp her entire look starting with a haircare routine and a new haircut, a complete skincare routine, and a new, school makeup.

title: Lipstick Collector Run
description: Lipstick Collector Run is a classic vertical arcade game with a single-button control. Your mission: collect all the lipstick parts while dodging obstacles and earn money. Unlock marked levels by completing 8 wraps. Use money to draw 8 different colors. Earn extra cash with 8 hands that boost your lipstick collection. The more lipsticks you gather, the more money you’ll make!

title: Monster Dash
description:
Sprint, Jump and Blast your way through Monster Dash, an action-packed game by the creators of Jetpack Joyride and Fruit Ninja.

Join Barry Steakfries and his iconic Machine Gun Jetpack in a world full of menacing monster mayhem, as you run and gun your way through hordes of zombies, vampires and more with the most explosive and powerful weapons you can find!

title: Type Sprint
description: Are you good at typing on the keyboard or mobile? Type Sprint is both a running racing game and a typing relaxation game with 3D stickman players. It is managed for you to type fast to make platforms for your character to run forward as the first three. I think typing on PC is easier than it on mobile. Good luck and have fun!

title: Warping Bat
description: In Warping Bat you have to bounce from spring to spring in order to collect all of the coins in the level which will then open the exit gate. Face more than twenty levels, avoiding obstacles, and bouncing around each level! Try your best and see if you have what it takes to complete the game in its entirety!

title: Hidden Pairs Mahjong
description: Match and clear all the tile in this Hidden Pairs Mahjong solitaire game. Use your observation skills to find and select identical open tiles to remove them from the board. With beautifully designed classic Mahjong symbols, smooth animations, and a calming background, each level offers a fresh puzzle challenge.Earn bonus time, increase your score, and progress through endless levels of tile-matching fun!

title: Maze Craze
description: Step into the captivating world of Maze Craze, a puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, Maze Craze offers an endless journey through a variety of mazes, each with its own unique set of challenges and surprises.

title: Dollys Restaurant Organizing
description: This exciting game is designed to help you organize better and release your stress. You will draw inspiration and creativity of storage through [Storage Master], and pack your life comfortably and cleanly. You can organize and clean objects by category, storage location and cleaning order. This game will bring you the creative inspiration of storage, allowing you to easily apply it in real life. Similar to a jigsaw puzzle, you have to pick the right object and put it in the right place

title: Gorilla Adventure
description:
Gorilla Adventure immerses players in an open-world, action-adventure platform game that unfolds within a nocturnal cityscape. In this game, the future's technological advancements have precipitated the downfall of the natural world, plunging players into a mysterious and eerie electronic realm. 

Embark on this journey and master the art of hammer swinging to set new records. Embrace the fury of Gorilla and get ready for an exhilarating climb to the top!

title: Hydro Racing 3D
description: Would you like to participate in a great boat racing game with Hydro Racing 3D? Not only racing but also lots of free map activities and exciting career mode chapters are waiting. The boats are shiny and faster than each other. The nitrous fuel makes them faster and stronger. Get in your place in the water parkour and start either racing or free driving in single or 2 player mode. Let the speedboat adventure begin!

title: Cut Grass
description: Do you know powerful a ring blade is? Cut Grass will show you a famous Mexican weapon in a 3D collecting puzzle arcade game. Here is some weed on the mud, your mission is to cut them all down at all levels. Without time and score limitations, keep calm and have a good time!

title: Us Army Car Games Truck Driving
description: Army truck 3d simulator is a realistic military game in which they supply their weapons, foods also use them for the transportation of troops for war and to protect their city from terrorist attacks. Are you looking forward to have an amazing modern army truck driver game to drive your army vehicle and become an army machines driver, as much as you want.

title: HeroBall Adventures 2
description: It’s time to embark on a brand new adventure in this great game, this time in a spherical theme! Heroball Adventures 2 is finally here! It’s a fun game where heroball has to save his friends who were abducted by a strange machine on an otherwise calm day. Control the character, jump over obstacles and try to save all of your friends. Be sure to try to get to the end of each level. Collect points and unlock new abilities!

title: Word Scramble - Family Tales
description: Want a distraction from the annoyances of daily life, or is your brain tired of solving exactly the same problems? Welcome to Word Scramble: Family Tales! Train your gray matter by solving word search puzzles and level up your vocabulary! An exciting family adventure, colorful locations and engaging play make this game hard to tear yourself away from. The story of a long-awaited child finally arriving in a family will come to life literally in front of your eyes.

title: Winter CosmoFest
description: Immerse yourself in a magical winter adventure in the Honkai universe. Show your creativity by creating festive cosplay outfits for the heroes of the game. Combine gorgeous costumes, accessories and hairstyles to capture the spirit of your favorite characters among snowflakes and winter landscapes. Show off your fashion skills by choosing the perfect ensemble for the winter cosplay festival. Win the hearts of Honkai fans and share your ideas with your friends!

title: Screamals
description:
Change the shape of the characters with simple up-and-down manipulations
Even if obstacles get in the way, they can change their shape and pass through.
Break through the obstacle, collect the notes and fire them at the boss!

title: Evony The King's Return
description: Want to conquer the world? In Evony: The King's Return, step into a vast universe of war and zombie attacks. Command an army and use powerful weapons and guns to attack the enemy. Keep moving your soldiers, shoot digital doors, and expand your army! Keep shooting to get the gun. Face endless zombie waves with your shooting skills and unlock powerful weapons.

title: Brainrot Bridge Race 3D
description: This is not just a simple running and racing game. It’s a brainrot-style 3D battle where speed and strategy collide! Your goal is to collect as many bananas as possible while sprinting through hilarious obstacle courses. Collect more bananas to evolve your form.

title: Rich Choice Run
description: Rich Choice Run is a fun swipe runner where every decision shapes your final lifestyle. Slide left and right to pick the best “boyfriend” choices and grab expensive items along the way. Your choices build your value and status—choose wisely, because one bad pick can ruin your chance.

title: Venetian Love Affair
description: Go to the festive Venice and become a fashion stylist for two girlfriends, each of whom dreams of an unforgettable fancy dress. Create unique masks with great designs and choose luxurious Baroque dresses, jewelry and accessories. Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of mystery and romance of the Venetian carnival. Unleash your talent as a fashion designer in a unique way for the masquerade participants. Get ready for a magical journey into the world of love and mysteries!

title: Frost Land - Snow Survival
description: Frost Land - Snow Survival is a strategic base-building game where you battle the harsh cold to stay alive. You’ll wield a flamethrower to melt snow, uncover hidden resources, and expand your shelter. Every choice matters—manage supplies wisely and decide which frozen zones to explore as you carve out survival in a relentless winter.

title: ColorWars.io - Conquest Game
description: Color Wars is a fast-paced strategy game where you battle three opponents to control the most territory before time runs out. Deploy powerful cards like Warrior, Ranger, Thunder, and Wizard, each with unique abilities. Earn trophies by ranking in the top two and use gold to upgrade your cards. Plan smart moves, outplay rivals, and dominate the battlefield.

title: Clean The Floor
description:
The house is so dirty. We need a cleaner ASAP.
Your job is to clean the floor spotless and make the owner satisfied as much as possible.
Use your vacuum machine to wipe out the dirt, and trash on the floor and make them clean again

title: The Big Hit Run
description: The Big Hit Run is a parkour game full of action! You will fly through colorful and vibrant cities. Avoid obstacles flexibly and keep running. Collect gems and power items. Watch your powers grow, with unbeatable arms.

title: Trial Xtreme
description: Trial Xtreme is an exciting game in which you have to get a new experience from driving a motorcycle. Experience a sea of adrenaline while riding a motorcycle and passing 30 levels with dizzying and spectacular obstacles.

title: Stickman escapes from prison
description: New prison escape adventures welcome you! Your task is to play as a Stickman and find all the ways to successfully escape from prison. 10 different items to choose from are hidden in a secret place. Some items will lead you to victory, but many other items will lead you to death. Interesting animations and jokes will delight your attention. Check out all the items and enjoy the different situations in the zone.

title: 2 Player Games Kids Kitchen
description: Do you want to run your own restaurant? Want to experience the blend of collaboration and cooking fun? Join H5games4u's best restaurant tycoon game and enjoy cooking fun. You will engage in different gaming modes. The best part is that you can work together with your friends in the virtual restaurant!

title: Stickboys Hook
description: Swing with Stickboys and jump your way to the finish line. Stickboys needs your help. Assist him and reach the goal! Jump from launch ramps and shoot webs to get to the end. You must complete every level. Be careful — if you fall from the sky, you lose the game.

title: Bottle challenge
description: This is a puzzle game, the game provides different volumes of the kettle, according to the game level prompts each kettle needs a different magnitude, to reach the required magnitude of the prompt can be cleared

title: Star Wing
description: Earth's last hope is in your hands, take control of the lone spaceship and protect Earth from alien swarms. Your goal will be quite challenging as you will have to save the Universe from its evil enemies. In this space shooting game, you will be facing an increasingly large number of enemies in hazardous environments. As the game progresses, you will earn the right to upgrade your spacecraft to unleash its full lethal capacity.

title: Puzzle Masters: Travelers
description:
Puzzle Masters Travelers is a relaxing and colorful jigsaw puzzle game where you assemble beautiful landscapes from dozens of pieces.
Travel across stunning locations around the world, unlock new sceneries, and enjoy the soothing atmosphere of discovery!
Use helpful boosters to finish each picture before the timer runs out. Challenge your focus, patience, and speed — and become a true puzzle master!

title: Shoot N Crush
description: Unleash your shooting skills and break bricks in Shoot N Crush. This game is the best choice for your leisure time. Your goal is to shoot with precision and flexibility. Use the bouncing ball to smash a solid brick with precision. Each level has a different objective and difficulty, you need to break these bricks in the smartest way possible.

title: Mahjong Magic Islands
description:
The wonderful world of the Magic Islands is in desparate need of magic to help restore the waning natural beauty of their ancient cities with a new wild energy. Tons of mythical creatures await your help throughout these scattered island. You are their only hope to be saved, fix these wonderful magic lands back to their former beauty!

Mahjong: Tile Match features classic mahjong solitaire in a uniquely original visual format.

title: Demolition Derby Derby
description: Welcome to Demolition Derby the mobile sensation where you control the chaos! Strategically tap to toss dynamite and swipe to send rocks crashing down. Decimate buildings and statues with precision in this hyper-casual game.

title: Asoka Makeup Indian Bride
description: Immerse yourself in the colorful world of the Indian wedding tradition with Princesses Jacqueline and Eliza! Help them create the perfect wedding look with the help of various cosmetics and accessories. Use bright shadows, radiant blush and long-lasting lipstick to make the princesses look dazzling. Do not forget about the traditional jewelry: nath, earrings and necklace. Complete the image of an Indian bride and help the princesses become the most beautiful on the holiday!

title: Destination Brain Test
description: Destination Brain Test is a great puzzle game to text your brain. You only need to drag to launch the ball to destroy all the blocks with various shapes. The farther you go, the more difficult levels you will meet. Luckily, you can try countless times in this game. So, try to challenge it now!

title: Slide Them Away
description: Slide Them Away is a puzzle game. In each slider puzzle, you will see a grid with colored grid edges with squares inside these borders. The squares are the same color as the grid edges. The number of colors may vary. Each slider puzzle aims to get rid of all blocks locked within the edges of the grid.

title: GunFu Stickman 2
description:
Armed with a pistol in each hand, take control of the famous Stickman from the "Gun Fu" series and blast through hordes of enemies!

Reflexes and reaction times will be challenged and put to the test as the never-ending onslaught gets faster and faster!

Unlock more deadly guns and outfits, and customize your Stickman to suit your style!

title: Gas Station - Stick Simulator
description: You start with a small gas station in the middle of the highway, where everything depends on you. Service cars, fill up with gas, earn coins, and build even bigger! Over time, your gas station will grow into a true empire: with a store, restroom, cafe, and even a hot dog delivery service. The more customers, the more profit, upgrades, and fun!

title: Solitaire Deluxe Edition
description:
Everyone's favorite classic card game is back. And this time, it's even more fancy and awesome!

Feast your eyes on the classic game that has been upgraded to look even better than before. Try your hand once again and see if you can beat it like you used to.

Is it all skill or does luck have some say in the matter? Come play now and let's find out!

title: Sniper Elite 3D
description: Prepare to enjoy the finest 3D sniper experience ever with the most thrilling and action-packed shooting game! Sniper 3D is the ultimate free gun game that immerses you in the life of a lethal assassin.
