Immerse yourself in high-intensity offline missions and test your shooting abilities in this adrenaline-fueled sniper experience. Have fun playing Sniper Elite 3D, a free online game!

title: Hexa Tap Away
description: Hexa Tap Away is a sleek one-direction hex puzzle. Drag tiles to move them in the only direction they can travel, create space, and clear the board. Each level adds trickier layouts, blockers, and tight corridors that demand planning ahead. Short, snackable stages, smooth controls, and a clean look make it easy to start and hard to stop. Stuck? Try a hint or rethink your route and there’s always a smarter move!

title: Obby Rescue Pin
description:
Obby Rescue Pin is a brain-burning, high IQ puzzle game that is especially addictive. How you pull the pins to rescue the Obby depends entirely on your logic and strategy!
Avoid Dangers: Navigate around bombs, ferocious animals, and deadly traps.
Outsmart the Room: Unlike simple rope rescue games, this experience focuses more on strategic adventures.
Help the Escape: Clear the path to help the Obby escape out of the dangerous room.

title: Doodle Football
description: Doodle Football is an imaginative and captivating 2D casual game that combines creativity, strategy, and fun. Your goal is simple: guide the football into the goal while overcoming exciting challenges across a variety of themes like the lush greenery of fields, the scorching sands of the desert, and the frosty landscapes of ice.

title: Merry Christmas Connect
description: 《Cute Animal Connect》is a classic puzzle game where you connect identical patterns to eliminate them and score points. It tests your observation skills and reaction speed, with simple yet addictive gameplay that appeals to players of all ages.

title: Cubes 2048.io
description: Begin an exciting .io battle where Snake meets 2048 in a nervous arcade showdown. Control your cube snake, collect, merge, and grow bigger while outsmarting opponents in this classic action-puzzle game. Control your snake to navigate around the map. Collect more cubes and merge the same numbers to reach 2048. Match the same number to make it bigger.

title: Boxteria
description:
Dive into an amazing cubic world, where you can become anyone from a BANDIT to a ZOMBIE attacking everyone around! Imagine having 20 super cool cars at your disposal to ride, drift, and have fun on maps like "Russian Village," and "Courtyard," spaces filled with adventures.

You'll enjoy creating characters, each unique in their own way. You can assemble a team of bandits, zombies, or even police officers and engage in thrilling battles or cool races.

title: Fun Obby Extreme
description:
Are you ready to experience an extreme game Fun Obby Extreme is a 3D parkour type game, little Obby needs you to help him jump across the platforms and reach the goal of each level.

Explore a sprawling city, level up and unlock new equipment, all while honing your parkour skills along the way!

title: Square Punki Long Hand
description: Ever wondered what life would be like with super long arms? In Square Punki Long Hand, you get to experience just that! This unique puzzle game challenges you to stretch, grab, prank, and solve hilarious puzzles using your extra-long limbs. Whether you're rescuing trapped characters, reaching impossible places, or pulling off mischievous tricks, every level is filled with surprises and laughter!

title: Cubatoria Merge 2048
description:
Welcome to the exciting world of Cubatoria Merge 2048! This game combines elements of the classic 2048 game with a three-dimensional visual design, which makes it unique and exciting.

The game is designed for fans of puzzles, logic games and those who appreciate a creative approach to classic concepts. Cubatoria Merge 2048 promises an exciting immersion in virtual space with the opportunity to enjoy a new visual experience.

title: One Line Drawing
description: Welcome to One Line Drawing, a game that brings together a variety of line drawing gameplays. You can relax through relaxing line drawing gameplay, or challenge yourself through puzzle-type line drawing gameplay.

title: Sweet Merge
description: Dive into 'Sweet Merge', a relaxing and delightful game where your goal is simple: merge and combine an assortment of sweets like jellies, cakes, and candies to create a new bigger sweet. How large can you make your sweet merge?

title: Tank Stars
description: Are you ready for an action-packed 2D tank warfare? Welcome to the Tank Stars, one of the best battle tank games that you can play with friends online & offline. Find the right shooting angle and unleash your iron force against your foe's war machines! Make the right shot quickly or you'll lose!

title: Hobo Speedster
description: Hobo Speedster is an exciting motorcycle platform BMX game featuring 2D cartoon graphics. Your mission? Keep the motorcycle balanced until you reach the finish line. As you earn coins and diamonds, upgrade your current bike at the motorcycle settlement, purchase 3 more motorcycles from the Shop, and unlock 4 additional riders in the Decorate section. Ready for a personal challenge? Explore various maps and aim to complete all 7 tasks for extra rewards!

title: Link & Color Pictures
description: Link & Color Pictures is a captivating coloring puzzle game where you connect colorful dots to fill in the colors of intricate pictures. Dive into a world of creativity and challenge as you complete all sections of the picture to finish each level.

title: Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle
description: Ready to challenge your mind and intelligence in the Screw Sort 3D: Screw Puzzle. This casual 3D Screw Puzzle game will take you into a world of creativity and puzzle solving fun. Here you need to match the screws of the same color and move them to the correct box. You sort screws by their colors. Keep moving the model to find the corresponding color.

title: Yummy Tales 3
description: Join Oscar, the clever farm dog, in Yummy Tales 3 — the fun and addictive Match 3 puzzle game! Match 3 or more fruits and veggies to feed your farm animals and reach level goals before you run out of moves. Enjoy over 2500+ exciting levels, daily missions, and challenges. Collect daily gifts, boosters, and fantastic rewards to help you beat tricky puzzles. Harvest the fun and start playing Yummy Tales 3 now!

title: Slime Farm!
description: Farm Slime: Slime Farm Simulator is a relaxing yet addictive game where you drive a suction truck to vacuum up unruly slimes and turn them into cash. Cruise smoothly through gooey fields, slurp with satisfying precision, sell your haul to upgrade your truck and expand your farm into a thriving slime empire.

title: Snap Fix
description:
Snap Fix is a fast-paced block puzzle game where you slide tiles to restore a scrambled picture.
With one empty space to maneuver, you must think quickly and arrange the grid before time runs out!
Complete the puzzle to unlock and download the image as a reward.
Can you snap everything into place before the clock hits zero?

title: Nubik in the Monster World
description:
Nubik saved the kittens, but the monsters are back! Evil Huggy has kidnapped them again!
Now Nubik has new weapons: AK-47, M16, grenade launcher, machine gun, and shotguns!
Help him rescue the kittens, collect loot, earn coins, upgrade, blast TNT, and escape traps. Even his friend gets captured—help Nubik save him too!

title: Island Expander
description:
Island Expander — relaxing crafting game. Collect resources, discover 30+ recipes, and grow your island step by step!
It is a cozy crafting game where you transform a tiny island into a paradise.
Collect resources, unlock recipes, craft items — from simple tools to complex machines — and watch your island grow with every step.

Start building your dream island today! ?

title: Fish Kingdom
description: Our game will show you in all the beauty of the real sea world. A world in which life is booming, because it is inhabited by sea creatures, mermaids, shells, plankton and many other amazing creatures of the sea world!

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Pets vs Bees
description: Protect the cute superhero dogs from the attack of the bees.immediately draw a barrier and protect the superhero dogs before the bees get out of their hive.

title: Smashdoll
description:
Smashdoll – Ragdoll Smash Game is a fast and chaotic physics game where you smash through floors, obstacles, and enemies to reach the bottom! Collect coins, dodge bullets, and upgrade your smash power, jump force, and trails.

Break enough floors to charge your smash meter and transform into an unstoppable bullet of destruction. How far can you smash?

title: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby
description: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby is a fast-paced, acrobatic and challenging stunt racing game. In these races with hundreds of different levels, each new track creates a completely different excitement with its special design. You can play Epic Car Stunt Race Obby against AI racers or with your friend in 2 player mode. Start the endless racing excitement now!

title: Yummy Trails
description: Can you help the hungry snake navigate the tastiest trail of all? The path may be tricky, but the reward is delicious. Test your brain and relax.

title: Dead Faces Clone Online
description:
Dead Faces Clone Online is a horror, intrigue, investigation, and object collection game in a 3D game in the dark horror category. You can play it for free in your favorite browser.

You will control the main character, who is in a building with many strange things that are happening. Investigate, follow the instructions to find the items, don't be afraid, and solve each of the levels of this game.

title: RiddleMath
description: Math Riddles level up your IQ with a mix of logical puzzles. Challenge yourself with different levels of math games and stretch the limits of your mind. Brain games are prepared with an approach of an IQ test.

title: MergeDuel.io
description: Merge Duel is a fast-paced 1v1 battle game where strategy and quick decisions lead to victory. Merge and upgrade your cannons to summon powerful units and counter your opponent in real time. Every match challenges your tactical skills as you adapt to new enemies and situations. Climb the ranks, dominate the leaderboard, and enjoy vibrant visuals, smooth controls, and intense duels from start to finish.

title: Sniper Team 3
description:
Take down waves of enemies using powerful sniper rifles in this action packed shooting game.

Sniper Team 3 is a sniper shooting game where you have to defeat enemy forces with the fire power of your whole team. The missions are a true challenge even for veteran snipers. 

Switch between your team members in real time, and make good use of your scoped rifles, heavy assault weapons and tactical airstrikes.

title: Hero Tower Wars Merge Puzzle
description: Join the exciting world of Hero Tower Wars - Merge Puzzle! Here is filled with tower defense strategy and merging games. Being careful of strategy and quick thinking are important. You'll play as a brave hero, battling enemies in layers of towers by mergers and digital strategies. Each tower has a different number of enemies. Use every number and a stronger sword to defeat enemies.

title: Water Sort
description: Experience the simple yet addictive water sorting puzzle game! It’s the ultimate free game for training your brain, killing time, and relaxing!

title: Physics Box 2
description: Get ready for a fun and challenging physics game with 45 levels to complete. Easy to play but challenging to complete. Just tap or click on the screen to shoot an impulse out of the box that will make it move. Trickly levels will have you getting the box to buttons to open gates, avoiding sawtooth obstacles and making the box invincible to laser gates.

title: Lambo Traffic Racer
description: Lambo Traffic Racing, you will be playing lambo cars through endless highway. It is a great game for kids and adults. Great fun, great graphics and great lambos to drive .

title: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game
description: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game is a chaotic puzzle hunt where you track a target brainrot through surreal, meme-soaked worlds. Each level pushes you to spot the same creature across dense, absurd scenes packed with icons like 67, Strawberry Elephant, Dragon Cannelloni, Spaghetti Tualetti, and La Supreme Combinasion. Fast-paced scanning, wild details, and pure internet nonsense create a frantic, high-energy experience for fans of intense spotting and brainrot chaos.

title: Build A Queen 2025
description: In Build a Queen 2025, you will embark on a fun journey to become a real queen. You will need to make your way through different platform levels with your opponents. Choose outfits, skin colors, and more according to your goals. Dress up in the most glamorous queen look, meet the prince, and win. You can collect money to unlock more dance steps.

title: Solitaire Klondike
description:
Step into the timeless challenge of Solitaire Klondike, an addictive HTML5 card game designed for fans of classic solitaire. Enjoy hours of relaxing gameplay with this popular version of Klondike Solitaire, where players arrange cards in descending order and alternate colors to win. If you need a fresh start, simply shuffle new cards to explore different winning strategies!
Perfect for anyone who loves solitaire,  Solitaire Klondike combines strategy, patience, and quick thinking.

title: Cookie Land
description: Step into Cookie Land, the ultimate sweet Match 3 adventure! Match cookies, candies, pies, donuts, cupcakes, and cotton candies to clear the board and trigger scrumptious chain reactions. Explore a fairytale-like saga map filled with colorful sweets, charming graphics, and a catchy soundtrack. With new treats raining down and endless levels of fun, Cookie Land is the most addictive, mouth-watering Match 3 game for all sweet lovers!

title: Bubble Shooter: Spinner Pop
description:
Take the classic bubble shooter to a new level! Bubble Shooter: Spinner Pop features a rotating puzzle core that rewards smart aiming and chain reactions. 
Clear all bubbles to complete each level and earn up to 3 stars (10 pts per direct match, 20 pts for freed bubbles).
Beware the deadly Magma Vortex, and avoid fouls that add extra bubbles for missed matches!

title: Mermaid Princess Avater Castle
description: This is a dress-up and decorating game for girls. If you like games where you create your world, you can't miss our game. There is a group of mermaids living in the underwater world and you can live with them and create beautiful memories.

title: Shelter Security: Gatekeeper Simulator
description: Become the gatekeeper of the most bizarre shelter in a post-apocalyptic world! In this guard simulator, you’ll face chaos, humor, and wild challenges. Inspect documents at the visa center, scan luggage for contraband, and distinguish peaceful residents from prankster mutants and disguised bandits.

title: Color Jam 3D
description:
Color Jam 3D is a fun and relaxing match-and-merge puzzle game! Combine crayons of the same colors  to fill the picture and bring stunning images to life with vibrant colors.
With engaging gameplay and satisfying color-filling mechanics, Color Jam 3D offers a unique blend of puzzle-solving and artistic expression.

title: Stickman Archer: Shooting Arrows at Reds
description:
Red hooligans have started to take over ancient excavations!

Only the Great Archer can stop the villains in red!

Stickman the Archer wants to save the world from evil hooligans and now he needs your help!
Your goal is to destroy enemy shooters and defeat all the bosses. You are armed with a bow and arrows!

title: Ragdoll Football 2 Players
description: Ragdoll Football 2 players is an exciting and fun sports game in which you can feel like a real football player! Fight with friends or the computer by controlling a ragdoll stickman on the football field. Show your skills and wit to score grand goals and become a champion.

title: Domino Online Multiplayer
description:
Do you like strategy, excitement and duel battles? You will find different modes, flexible settings and strong opponents.

Variety of modes:
With a computer – hone your skills against AI of varying difficulty
Online Duels - fight with live players in real time
Play with a friend – send a link and play together, even from a distance
On one screen – convenient for pair battles at home

Every game is a challenge, and every move is a step towards victory!

title: Ghost Escape 3D
description: You are locked in a hospital that seems to be HAUNTED. Now you have to try to get out of the hospital, but you can only get out after you collect all the posters/pictures, but be careful and quiet, GHOST hears everything.

title: Hoard Master Online
description: This is an upgrade and construction simulation game in which Empty is the protagonist. Use it to devour everything you want in exchange for money. Build and upgrade your black holes and territories!

title: Bounce Dunk Basketball
description: Love basketball? Want to master the art of bouncing and dunking? In Bounce Dunk - Basketball, you must skillfully control the balls bounce to make perfect shots and get high scores. Tap the screen to control the angle and strength of the basketball so that the ball bounces perfectly into the basket. Or destroy enemies, get coins, etc.

title: Reflect Beam: Laser Logic
description:
Logic game where every move changes the beam’s path. 

5 modes - 5 types of challenges.
Tunnel: rotate shapes and guide the beam through narrow passages.
Labyrinth: draw a safe path to the exit.
Same Colors: remove blocks of the right color to open the route.
Obstacles: move elements and clear the way for the beam.
Time is limeted: solve faster and more accurately before time runs out.

title: Funny Walk Fail Run
description: Funny Walk Fail Run is a fun-filled arcade action game with funny and magical gameplay! You will control a villain in the game to do challenges. But don't expect him to walk steadily, because he always falls and bumps in all sorts of funny positions! Your job is to help him navigate each step of the shaky road.

title: Pet Doctor Business Tycoon-Pet care game
description: Step into the world of animal care with Pet Doctor – Animal Hospital Simulator! Become a kind and skilled veterinarian as you treat adorable pets including cats, dogs, rabbits, and more. Use realistic medical tools to diagnose, clean wounds, check heartbeats, and perform surgeries. Each level brings new challenges where you must care for sick, injured, or pregnant animals in a friendly hospital environment.

title: Online Cats Multiplayer Park
description: Come to run, jump, guess, and race as a cute but competitive kitty in Online Cats - Multiplayer Park. It’s a real-time multiplayer chaos arena. Here are seven modes you can choose from. In Grab A Shabby Ball, for example, you will have to compete with your opponents and try to touch the ball to get points.

title: Hexa Sort Master
description:
Let's sort some hexa blocks on the hexa tiles. Hexa blocks consist of colorful pieces. Place the same colored pieces side by side and match them to stack all hexas over one tile.
A great puzzle game begins with colorful hexa blocks! Sort the stacks side by side and try to destroy them making hexa towers. Match the same colors with each other. Exercise and improve your brain skills. More than 200 levels are waiting for you!

title: Athena Match
description: Embark on a mythical journey in Athena Match, a Match 3 game set in Ancient Greece. Guided by the goddess Athena, match three or more identical artifacts to clear levels and uncover Greek secrets. Stunning visuals and rich soundscapes bring this world to life as you solve puzzles and overcome mythical obstacles inspired by Greek lore. Ready to prove your skills? Join Athena and dive into the adventure!

title: Shopaholic Black Friday
description: Experience fashion fun like never before with the Shopaholic Black Friday game! Navigate through makeup products, and indulge in chic fashion pieces. Hit the mall, shop as many items as you can before the time runs out, and then return for another styling adventure. Explore an array of lipstick hues, experiment with smoky eyes, or go for colorful shadows, and browse through fashionable dresses, trendy tops, and stylish shoes. Complete the look with dazzling accessories and designer bags.

title: Tile Living
description: Select matching tiles that can be connected with up to 3 straight lines to clear them! Clear all the tiles to complete the stage! Use the coins you collect from clearing stages to decorate your room!

title: Kitten Never Dies
description: Join an interdimensional adventure to help a lost kitten find its way home! Solve unique challenges in each dimension. Cute, clever, and full of surprises—are you up for the challenge? Play now and test your puzzle-solving skills!

title: angry snake io
description: Angry Snake io " is an exciting and addictive arcade game where you take control of a fierce, hungry snake on a mission to grow, survive, and dominate the arena! Slither through a vibrant world, gobbling up colorful orbs to grow longer and stronger. But watch out—danger lurks around every corner! Avoid obstacles, outsmart traps, and navigate increasingly challenging levels as your snake grows bigger and faster.

title: Squid Game 3D
description:
Engaging Puzzles: Each level offers a unique challenge, whether it’s rhythm-based action, strategic battles, or construction puzzles.
Diverse Gameplay: No two levels are the same, keeping players engaged and on their toes.
Skill Progression: As you advance, levels become more complex, requiring a blend of quick thinking, strategy, and precise execution.

title: Pushover 3D
description: Unleash your creativity in *Pushover 3D*! Draw unique curves to control your ragdoll fighter’s moves, launching them in unexpected ways to defeat opponents. Each match is a wild, physics-based showdown where every line transforms into unpredictable body motions. From wild spins to slingshot leaps, it’s all up to the patterns you create. Experiment, outsmart your rivals, and become a master of ragdoll combat!

title: FlowBall
description: Feel the adrenaline in an exciting 3D arcade game where you control a glowing ball racing through an endless tunnel! Avoid traps, chasms and obstacles, defying the laws of gravity. Your goal is to collect glowing dots to unlock new levels and set records! But be careful: falling into the abyss takes away lives, and losing them leads to defeat!

title: BMG: CrashDay 2025
description: The game "BMG: CrashDay 2025" is an arcade racing simulator that combines elements of action and realism. Players can choose from a variety of cars, each with its own unique characteristics and appearance. The game has various tracks, each with its own features, such as difficult turns, steep climbs and descents, as well as various obstacles.

title: Dog Merge Mania
description: Merge cute puppies! Unlock breeds & grow your own fluffy dog paradise! A Relaxing Escape: The perfect mix of chill gameplay and light strategy.

title: Desert Rover Survival
description: Desert Rover Survival is an idle survival adventure set in a harsh desert world. Begin with a simple setup and slowly build your own desert rover, upgrading parts and improving technology to push farther into the wasteland.

title: Face Changes
description: Face Changer is a fun puzzle game in which you have to correctly put together different faces in order to move to the next level or achieve new and better results in the training mode.

title: Ocean Kids Back To School
description: Welcome to Ocean Kids Back to school. It’s back to school time for these Kids. Can you help them get ready for their first day of classes? They’ll need to pick some cool outfits, new hairstyles, accessories, and school supplies too in this online dress-up and design game for girls. After you’re all done, help them to repair their vespa. Play and have fun!

title: Sort And Style: Back To School
description: Step into the world of Sort And Style: Back To School, a fun mix of sorting and dress-up games for girls! Organize messy desks, lockers, wardrobes, and even bento boxes across 9 exciting levels. Then, challenge your creativity in the final dress-up unit where you style your school look with trendy uniforms, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories. Perfect for fans of organizing games, makeover fun, and school fashion challenges!

title: Digger Fighter in the Maze
description: Digger Fighter in the Maze is an action-packed adventure game that takes you deep into a mysterious underground labyrinth filled with secrets, dangers, and treasures. Step into the shoes of a brave digger fighter as you tunnel your way through winding mazes, uncover hidden paths, and gather valuable resources. Along the way, you'll meet and recruit powerful allies, each with unique abilities that can help you overcome obstacles and defeat fierce enemies.

title: Craft of Wars
description: The war between the Reds and the Blues has never been more epic than in Craft of Wars! In this cubic game, you'll fight for strategic points on the map using a classic combat system similar to the one found in older versions of Minecraft. Prepare for intense sword and bow duels, TNT explosions, tactical use of potions, and the legendary golden apples that will help you survive the fiercest battles.

title: City Tower Builder
description: In the game, you need to develop your own city, build houses, and place them around the city. You need to build the houses evenly so that the blocks don't fall to the ground. The game is a combination of a city-building simulator and an exciting arcade game where you need to build even houses out of blocks so that the blocks don't fall and the houses don't collapse.

title: Alchemy Puzzle
description:
We create challenges with fun puzzles, challenge your brain and make you always smile on your lips.
Alchemy Puzzle will help you have moments of light entertainment, combined with puzzle play and fun real life characters.
If you've ever played games: puzzlers, word games, trivia games, quiz games, brain teasers, or just want to spend time have time to relax, let try Alchemy Puzzle, It's for you.

title: Spider Rope Hero City Fight
description: Protect the crime city by your extreme super powers. You will be a rope hero with ability of flying, crawling and spider. Now you have to eliminate the mafia. Your duty starts with the ultimate security of the president. The gangsters have kidnapped the state president, chased the gangsters and saved your president. Swing into action and unleash your superhero powers to save the city from chaos and destruction.

title: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup
description: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup is a game where the player controls a black hole trying to devour as many objects around it as possible. Eat more, grow more, then create a beauty makeover!  Cool black hole simulator. Absorb different objects. Unlock skins. Do you like black hole and simulators?

title: Parkour Block obby
description: Parkour block obby is a obby parkour where you need to pass obstacle courses. Collect diamonds, buy skins, get to the end and be the first!

title: Sprunki Memory Card Match
description:
Put your memory to the ultimate test with Sprunki Memory Card Match! Dive into a world of fun and challenge as you flip cards to reveal and match delightful Sprunki characters, scenes, and surprises. Perfect for kids and adults alike, this game combines entertainment with brain-boosting fun!
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who has the sharpest memory. With Sprunki Memory Card Match, every flip is a step closer to unlocking fun surprises and reaching the top!

title: Hill Station Bus Simulator
description: "Hill Station Bus Simulator" invites players to step into the shoes of a skilled bus driver navigating the challenging terrains of picturesque hill stations. As the primary protagonist, your mission is to efficiently transport passengers through winding roads, steep ascents, and captivating landscapes, while managing a thriving bus service. The game offers an engaging blend of realistic driving simulation, strategic decision-making, and immersive experiences.

title: Monster Collect Run
description:
Triump over enemies & you will be able to play as them. Which critter do you think is the best?

Run through levels collecting crystals & mighty projectiles. Unleash your ammo unto many fantastic beasts, that dare to challenge you.

title: Nose Hospital
description: In Nose Hospital Games, The patients are counting on you in this nose surgery hospital game. Will you rise to the occasion and become the hero in plastic surgery games, they desperately need? Step into the operating theater and redefine the world of nose plastic surgery games.

title: Save the crop
description: Save the Crop is an exciting arcade game where you control a tractor to rescue crops from fire! ?? Quickly cut and collect crops before they burn, then stack and sell them to earn money. Use your earnings to upgrade your tractor, buy storage houses, and explore new fields. Navigate using joystick controls and master the art of saving and farming in this fast-paced, action-packed game!

title: Skibidi Toilet vs Cameraman Sniper Game
description: Camera man are trying to survive in toilet mans red light green light game. If there is a camera man moving when the toilet man says red light, you must destroy him with your sniper gun. When aiming, you have to make sure you hit the right player. If you shoot the correct player, you earn additional points. Compete with your friends by getting the highest score. Play Toilet vs Cameraman Sniper now!

title: DriftClicker
description:
Race Clicker: DRIFT MAX is an action clicker that immerses you in the world of thrilling drift races, demanding lightning-fast reflexes and the ability to make decisions at high speed. Participate in dynamic drift where every turn is a high-speed challenge.
- Open containers to obtain unique parts and enhance your car.
- Participate in high-stakes races to earn keys for containers and unlock new possibilities.
- Upgrade your car to dominate races and defeat all your rivals.

title: Stunt Multiplayer Arena
description:
Go solo in a free roam challenge where you can pull off incredible stunts like front and backflips. Navigate icy and dirt tracks as you push various vehicles to their limits.

In the multiplayer derby mode, choose your vehicle—whether it's a car, truck, or van—and engage in a fierce survival derby. Compete against all other vehicles in an intense, smashing battle. 

Jump into the action today and see if you have what it takes to rule the arena!

title: Cut In Half
description:
Cut obstacles in the way with knives or characters.
If you touch a red block or fall into a valley, it's a game over.
Collect the goods as much as you cut the obstacles to unlock new characters!

title: Brawl Stars
description: Welcome to a multiplayer arena game! Brawl Stars will take you into a world full of action .io battles! You will experience nervous PVP battles and a unique evolution system. Choose your favorite hero including fire dragons, electric dogs or flower spirits.

title: Pool Merge
description:
This is an arcade puzzle with billiard physics and 2048 merge mechanics. Shoot balls, combine identical ones and score points!
Game modes:
Classic: plan your moves, avoid overflowing the field. With each new open ball level, the limit of allowed balls on the playing field increases.
Arcade: play for time, do not let the balls fall into the holes. Merging balls adds time to the timer, balls that fall into the holes take time away.

title: Word Stars
description: Find hidden words and piece together your success. Each puzzle is a step towards mastering the game and expanding your word power. Use hints to keep progressing. From the first word to the last, it’s a race to finish all the levels.

title: Bubble Shooter Blast
description: In the game you can become an experienced bubble shooter. You just need to choose a ball and shoot at the right place to burst the bubbles. You have to go through more than 200 levels, so play this exciting game and start popping bubbles. Collect and shoot 3 or more bubbles to experience a sweet victory! Blow up all the balloons with your quick thinking and tactics. The next level will be harder than the previous one. Are you ready to burst all the balloons in this game?

title: Base Jump Wingsuit Flying
description:
Spread your wings and start flying like you’ve never been before!

Base Jump Wing Suit Flying allows you to take part in awesome and exciting extreme sports. Use Wingsuit to jump and fly over multiple cool environments and beat your high scores! This is the new kind of arcade flight experience!

title: Eat Donuts
description: Swap, rotate, and smash colorful donut rings in a vibrant 3x3 grid to create explosive matches and devour points like never before. Start with easy levels like our sunny beachside challenge—rack up scores to hit that juicy target of 800, earn shiny coins for power-ups like the mighty hammer smash or speedy rotates, and unlock endless waves of mouthwatering fun.

title: Klondike Solitaire
description:
Test your skill and logic with Klondike, the classic solitaire game loved by generations!

Stack the cards in ascending order, alternating colors, and complete all four suits to win the game.

With clean graphics, intuitive controls, and the option to play with one or three cards, Klondike offers hours of fun and relaxation.

Perfect for a quick break or a long strategic challenge!

title: Super Racing
description: Compete to earn the most points across four connected courses with your favorite characters. The whole world is your racetrack in the Super Racing World game. Race from one course to another through interconnected paths that span the world. Traverse mountains, forests, cities, and more—with shifting weather patterns and a day/night cycle. Everything is connected! Collect coins and unlock new cars and characters.

title: Monster High Spooky Fashion
description: In Monster High Spooky Fashion, step into the world of ghouls and ghosts as you style your favorite Monster High characters! Choose spooky outfits, eerie accessories, and haunting makeup to create the ultimate creepy-cool look. Mix and match from a wide range of outfits to give each character a unique spooky style perfect for any Monster High event. Whether it’s for a Halloween party or a night out in the graveyard, bring out your inner fashionista with Halloween Spooky Fashion!

title: Sorting frogs
description: A game in the sorting genre, but in the form of sorting frogs, great graphics, very many levels, and a large variety of frogs. Several variations of levels. Pass levels, get achievements, unlock new kinds of frogs!

title: Zombies and Guns
description:
Urgently save: the evil spirits are coming!
You are a Fighter, who is attacked by hordes of zombies and all sorts of evil spirits! Don't let them eat you alive!

title: Chicken Jump : A Tap Challenge
description: This is simple but addictive chicken jump game. You'll have lots of levels and you have to save your chicken but swiping on screen from bottom to up to make chicken jump so that it can avoid hurdles.

title: Room Sort
description: Welcome to Room Sort - Floor Plan Game, the ultimate free puzzle game that combines the fun of tangram puzzles with the creativity of home design. In this engaging game, you’ll rearrange room blocks to complete floor plans. Each room connects through doors, so you'll need to place them perfectly to create a cohesive layout.

title: Skillful Finger
description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Zombie Rodeo Multiplication
description: Don't let your zombie lose his head or other body parts in this Halloween themed multiplication math game. Answer the multiplication problem correctly before time runs out so your zombie doesn't lose a body part. If you answer incorrectly or time runs out before you get the correct answer, a body part falls off of your zombie. Once all of his body parts fall off, the game is over.  See how far you can go and earn coins to get upgrades.  Four difficulty settings to choose from.

title: Love Tile Trio
description: Welcome to the Valentine's Day tile matching game! Your mission is to match and clear tiles from the board. Tap a tile and move it to an empty space or a spot with a matching tile. If no matches are available or there's no room, you'll need to try again. With a countdown timer and tricky puzzles, can you beat the Love Tile challenge?

title: Ragdoll Beat - Simulator
description:
In "Ragdoll Beat - Simulator" you will find crazy levels, chaos physics and familiar characters! How far can you go, creating incredible moments with a ragdoll?

-Unique levels, where every object can become a tool of fun.
-Realistic ragdoll physics - push, throw and watch the result!
-The more you play, the more new situations you discover!

Jump into "Ragdoll Beat - Simulator" and check what chaos physics is capable of! Complete all the tests, open new opportunities and enjoy crazy fun!

title: Number Tricky Puzzles
description: Thanks for visiting Number Tricky Puzzles, an addictive casual puzzle game. Your goal is to categorize identical coins into a slot and then click the merge button to combine them into higher-level coins. Keep merging coins and trying to evolve to see if you can reach the coveted level 10! You can challenge yourself to become the master of coin evolution! Beautiful graphics and animations bring you more fun.

title: Mahjong Riddles: Egypt
description:
Welcome to the mysterious world of Ancient Egypt! Find matching tiles, solve mahjong levels and collect artifacts to uncover secrets of Giza valley, Old city, Desert and Nile.
Discover how the Great Pyramid of Giza was constructed, how Egyptians learned to read hieroglyphs, why only the pharaoh could own a cat in Ancient Egypt and many more. 
Simple and engaging gameplay of mahjong solitaire is the best way to relax. You will find huge treasures, tricky locks, new bonus tiles and more.

title: Basketball Rush
description: This isn’t just about shooting — it's about precision, patience and strategy. As you score, the game intensifies, but with helpful power-ups at your disposal, you’ll be ready for anything. Unlock a variety of unique ball skins to customize your game and add even more excitement.

title: Bubble Around
description: Bubble Around is bubble shooter with a twist. You shoot the bubbles from the inside to the playing field around you. Match 3 or more bubbles to make them pop. Clear all bubbles to complete the level. Each level will be slightly more challenging. Stuck in a level? Use the bomb, rocket or multi color power up. Find out all level shapes!

title: Merge Smith
description:
If you combine the same items, a higher level of items will be created.
Make legendary items and become the best blacksmith.

title: Academy Assault
description: Cael has decided to challenge Rin, the strongest in the academy that he goes to. She will only accept his challenge after he has defeated the other students in Imperium Academy.

title: Amazing Airplane Racer
description: Amazing Airplane Racer revolutionizes the airborne gaming experience by combining high-speed plane racing with strategic special skills. Maneuver through challenging tracks while collecting power-ups like turbo boosts and shields to outsmart opponents. With stunning graphics and intense multiplayer action, the game delivers an adrenaline-packed aerial competition where skill and strategy take center stage. Are you ready to dominate the skies and become the ultimate airborne champion?

title: Single Stroke Line Draw
description:
Single Stroke Draw Line is a puzzle game with with one touch line drawing. It is required for you to draw one line to connect all the points without any route repetition.
- The rule is very simple, Draw given figures with only one touch.
- Explore amazing levels of this puzzle at your fingertips and sharpen your brain IQ & skills.
- Game level starts with very easy levels and increases in difficultly as you progress in the game.

title: Cashier Game
description: You play as a cashier who needs to punch the goods and give change to the customers. As you earn money, you can improve your store and buy new furnishings.

title: Plug Man Race
description: Plug Head Race plays like a collecting arcade game with battery items. To win the level, you need to overpass the finish line in first place. Each platform requires a lot of red battery items, collect them, and use them to pass the current switch. When you are weaker than others, keep away from them and collect red battery items only.  Remember to buy your favorite skins when you have enough gold coins.

title: Block Eating Simulator
description: The battle of the blocks begins in the block's arena with this great eating simulator game. Eat blocks around and grow your cube. Become the biggest block of the arena. Find various cube skins. Play single or 2 player! Cube players are all around the arena and they are eating blocks, cubes, and lower-scored players. Each block you eat will give you some points. Try to eat as many blocks as possible and try to eat low-scored players. Try to get to the top of the leaderboard.

title: Bunnies Sort
description:
Bunnies Sort is a cute and relaxing puzzle game where your goal is to organize adorable bunnies into the correct racks.

Each rack can hold three bunnies. Think carefully and move the bunnies one by one until every rack contains three matching bunnies.

With simple controls and charming visuals, Bunnies Sort is easy to learn but becomes more challenging as more bunnies appear. Can you sort them all and complete every level?

title: Halloween Fruit Slice
description: Halloween Fruit Slice is a high-energy arcade action game set in a spooky Halloween world. Vivid fruits and devious traps streak across the screen in an instant. Your task is to slice as many fruits as possible with lightning speed, chaining spectacular combos and racking up points while dodging explosive bombs. Rich visuals, splashy juice effects, and eerie backdrops create a thrilling, immersive atmosphere. The tempo keeps rising, so every moment tests your reflexes and precision.

title: Coin Stack Up
description:
Coin Stack Up is a colorful and satisfying puzzle game where strategy meets stacking fun!
Connect and stack coins of the same color to create powerful combinations and clear the board.
To make a valid move, you must connect at least 3 coins of the same color. The bigger the stack, the better the results! Each level comes with specific goals shown at the top of the screen - plan your moves carefully to complete them before you run out of moves.

title: Animal in Rails!
description:
An exciting puzzle game about delivering animals to a trader's base

Connect and disconnect railways around the world to help each animal reach its home.

Install, remove, and redirect connections so that wagons can safely connect to the locomotive. But be careful and don't let them collide with each other!

Delay trains by using railway barriers. Change the tracks to redirect the wagons in different directions. Pick up new pets along the way and face even more challenges along the way!

title: Ball Drop
description: Embark on a thrilling journey with Ball Drop, where your objective is to guide the bouncing ball safely through a series of perilous obstacles while avoiding deadly spikes. With its captivating minimalist design, responsive gameplay, immersive music, and 32 challenging levels, this game promises an addictive experience that will keep you hooked for hours.

title: Rainbow Friends Hide And Seek
description: Rainbow Friends Hide And Seek is an exciting and fast-paced hide-and-seek adventure game set in a colorful yet dangerous rainbow world. Step into this thrilling role-playing experience, choose your role, and get ready for an unforgettable adventure.

title: Princess Rescue Fruit Connect
description: Begin a fruity puzzle adventure. Princess Rescue Fruit Connect is a delightful match puzzle game where your mission is to rescue a beautiful princess by matching fruits and solving tricky levels. Connect two identical fruits to eliminate them. But notice clearing the board before time runs out. All while progressing to rescue the princess.

title: Bubble Ball
description: Bubble Ball is an untimed bubble-popping strategy game with a classic interface and arcade special effects noises. The player uses an arrow shooter to pop clusters of three or more matching bubbles to earn points and special gifts.

title: Skate Hooligans
description: Help the little hooligans escape from the policeman who is constantly trying to catch them. Try to collect as many bonuses and coins as possible on the road, for which you can buy new coolest skateboards and amazing characters. And do not forget to complete funny tasks, because the number of points you receive depends on this!

title: Block Blaster Puzzle
description: Aim for high scores or complete level objectives. Rotate and arrange blocks to clear rows and columns while enjoying stunning visuals. Each perfect move brings satisfaction, challenging you to beat your best and master each puzzle!

title: Pato Vs Cops
description: lay Pato Vs Cops — the ultimate free browser police chase game! No download needed — jump into nonstop car chases, dodge roadblocks, and outdrive relentless cops in fast-paced arcade action. Perfect for fans of unblocked racing games, endless car chase games, and online driving challenges. Show off your reflexes, collect power-ups, and see how long you can survive the heat in this thrilling high-speed pursuit!

title: Aqua Blitz 2
description: Welcome to Aquablitz 2 - the newest iteration of the beloved underwater match-3 game that comes with fresh new graphics, a catchy tune and lots of improvements! Meet your new hostess, Pearl, the little mermaid. She will be pleased to guide you on your adventure through more than 700 splashy levels and teach you all the tricks you need to know to solve even the most complicated puzzles.

title: Mahjong Slide Puzzle
description: Experience the thrill of Mahjong puzzles! Strategically match tiles, clear the board, and conquer challenging levels to achieve high scores!

title: World War Brothers WW2
description:
⭐WORLD WAR BROTHERS⭐
World war brothers is a ww2 online first person shooter game. Play with your friends destroy enemy bases, capture the points. Traditional weapons, maps, and more will add soon. We need your feedbacks.
⭐ Features ⭐
- PvP multiplayer 8v8 Allies vs. Axis Teams
- Daily missions will come soon
- Omaha Beach, Pacific maps

title: The Prism City Detectives
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure with "The Prism City Detectives" and join Luna, Ruby, Skye, Willow, Daisy, Violet, and Lumi in restoring color to their monochrome city! Explore dazzling dress-up levels and unravel hidden objects mysteries to find the missing Rainbow Gem and bring back the hues of unity.

title: Level Up Mutants
description: Level Up Mutants: An Awesome Casual Game.Discover the fun of training monsters in Level Up Mutants, the most addictive casual game ever! Combine different monsters to create dinosaurs and other powerful creatures. Level up your mutants and challenge your opponents. Test your hand speed and strategy skills. Can you become the best monster designer? Try Level Up Mutants now and have fun!

title: Wednesday Dark Academia
description: With Wednesday Dark Academia, you can choose from various unique and stylish outfits, accessories, and makeup options. Start with her makeup, creating a look that's perfect for school or the ballroom. Play dark lipstick and eyeshadow, and with a little bit of imagination, you can create a look that's all your own. Next, dress her up for a fun day at school, and then see what party look you can put together for her. Style her hair and pick the right accessories for a complete look.

title: Idle Barber Shop
description: Play Idle Barber Shop free online and run your own salon in a fast-loading browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Hire barbers, upgrade stations, style fresh cuts, and grow profits in a smart tycoon experience that feels like a light brain game of strategy and timing. This unblocked game works smoothly at school or home, is fully mobile-friendly, and runs perfectly on desktop and mobile. A free online game made for quick breaks and relaxing play.

title: Watermelon merge
description:
In this exciting game you will plunge into the fascinating world of combining different fruits. When they collide, they combine to create entirely new fruit combinations.

Start your journey with small and juicy fruits, combine them to create larger and more unique varieties. Your goal is to reach the magnificent watermelon that will be the culmination of your fruit adventure.

title: Mahjong Cute Tiles
description: Enjoy a classic Mahjong game, now in another dimension! Rotate the board, explore fresh tile layouts and challenge your mind. Show off your skills and use powerful boosters like undo moves, tile shuffles, bombs and hints to help you advance faster.

title: Idle Trade Isle
description: Idle Trade Isle is a casual simulation game. Let's go on an island adventure on the sea! You are a captain, driving a boat to the mysterious island group. Each island has different natural resources that need to be collected. After collecting them, go back to your own island to build and upgrade them.  Enjoy!

title: Madness Driver Vertigo City
description: Mad drivers meet in the vertigo city with their cool super sport racing cars. The city offers a plethora of exciting activities and races. Fly through the ramps and collect gems to double your fun. Enjoy amusement park activities and play single or 2 player mode to challenge your friend in races or free drive activities. Begin the supercar simulator and customize your cars with unique designs.

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: Sniper Shot Secret Mission
description:
Sniper Shot Secret Mission is a game of nerves and skills. Each time you start the new level, a challenge is waiting for you to solve. Never fire on the wrong target otherwise their no second chance as a sniper. 
As a sniper you need to work silently once you shoot the bullet everyone will be aware of the situation and you might loose your target. You can be targeted through security guards once you shoot at your high profile targets.

title: Tow N Go
description: Tow N Go is a thrilling game where you hit the road and become the coolest truck driver. Your mission is to tow cars parked in "No parking" areas and collect as many as you can at once. But beware! It's not an easy job. Avoid crashing into trains or other cars on the road. The more cars you collect, the richer you become. Challenge yourself in this exciting towing adventure and make loads of money today!

title: BFF Happy Spring
description: Welcome to the Bff Happy Spring games. Princesses Belle, Tiana, and Moana are best friends. They planned to organize a party to welcome the most adorable spring season. They already filled their wardrobe with a cherry blossom collection of outfits. Being a design expert join and help them to choose the best outfit for them. Have fun!

title: Princess Dress Up Run
description: Run, collect, and dress up like a true princess. Race around the fantasy track. Collect all kinds of gorgeous princess dresses, shoes and accessories along the way according to the goal. Create the perfect princess look. And watch out for obstacles and traps, such as suddenly broken platforms, flames, etc.

title: Spider-Noob obstacle course
description:
Noob was bitten by a creeper-spider and became a spider-noob! Help Noob train in the big city, fly on webs, collect badges, unlock new costumes, and complete challenges. Unlock new levels. 

Complete all the levels and turn Noob into a Pro-spider

title: Jetstream Escape
description: Play Jetstream Escape free online and dive into a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install required. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks or long sessions. Race powerful boats, dodge coast guards, and outrun storms in this mobile-friendly arcade challenge. Designed for desktop and mobile players who love skill-based brain game style reflex tests, it’s a free online game built for pure,nonstop.

title: Sudoku Garden
description: Players must expand their thinking to solve puzzles in adventures. Learn to approach problems from different angles and discover hidden clues and patterns to overcome challenges. These games test wit while fueling interest and challenge-seeking mentality.

title: Elementz
description: ElementZ is a Match-3 game similar to Bejeweled or Candy Crush. Its particularity lies in giving each color its elemental power, allowing you to trigger different powers of fire (red), water (blue), earth (brown), plants (green), and electricity (yellow).

title: 4 Hexa
description: 4 Hexa is a fun, colorful online puzzle game! Merge same-number blocks to reach higher scores in this addictive math trivia challenge. Perfect for fans of block match games and brain teasers! Play now and test your skills!

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: Brain puzzles-Quests
description: This is the puzzle game filled with challenging, interesting tasks that will help you relax and have fun. There are games for training thinking, mental tasks, and IQ tests suitable for those who like to think. Develop logic, pump your brains!

title: Free Hoops
description: Welcome to Free Hoops, the ultimate puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving! Dive into a world of quirky challenges where your goal is to skillfully adjust iron bars and guide elastic bands into predetermined boxes. Once the bands are in place, use them to tie around objects and destroy them to advance to the next level.

title: Go To Zero
description: Play Cool Math Zero, a brain-teasing puzzle where numbers fall, merge, and reduce until you hit zero! Perfect for fans of cool math games, number games, and tricky puzzle challenges. Test your logic, think fast, and solve addictive levels that sharpen your mind. Great for students searching fun school break games, free kids games, or brain games online. With simple controls and endless challenges, Go To Zero is the ultimate math puzzle adventure!

title: Princess Run 3D
description: Want a magical and exciting running adventure? Step into Princess Run 3D, a fun 3D platform arcade game full of exciting challenges. Play as a fearless princess racing through colorful 3D worlds. Collect beautiful clothes, shoes, hair, etc. Increase your charisma to get a maid of honor. They're going to help you fend off enemies in front of you or dirty mud, rain, etc. Be careful to avoid ugly clothes, costumes, bad weather, etc.

title: Feet Doctor Urgency Care
description:
As a podiatrist in this medical simulation game, treat various urgent foot conditions and save patients. As a doctor, you will take care of the patient's feet.
Use all tools to cure them.

title: Merge 2048 Cake
description:
Merge 2048 Cake is a colorful and relaxing puzzle game where you merge matching tiles to create higher numbers!
Combine three or more identical tiles to form a new one with double the value. Plan your moves, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and aim for the ultimate 2048 tile!
Enjoy smooth gameplay, vivid visuals, and a cozy, casual vibe that’s easy to play and hard to put down.

title: Monster Squad Rush
description:
Assemble your squad of powerful monsters, evolve them into champions, and claim victory in the ultimate battle arena. Adventure, strategy, and competition await!

Whether you’re rushing through the course, collecting monsters, or battling for supremacy, Monster Squad Rush offers non-stop action and fun. Build your legacy as the ultimate monster trainer and conquer the arena today!

title: Match Dream Garden
description: What a beautiful garden! Match leaves, flowers, apples and other items to progress. Use power-ups like the Hammer to remove any piece, the Rake to clear an entire row or column, or the Gardening Gloves to swap two pieces.

title: Fruit Merge Arena
description: Fruit Merge Arena is a fun and relaxing game where you drop fruits and merge the same ones to create bigger fruits. Keep merging step by step and try to reach the ultimate fruit — the watermelon! But be careful, space is limited and the board can fill up quickly. Plan your moves wisely and keep merging to stay in the game.Feeling stuck or running out of space? Don’t worry! You can watch a reward ad to remove all instances of a selected fruit and make room for new moves.

title: Brainrot Click to Hatch
description: Enter Brainrot Click to Hatch, the most absurd and epic clicker at the same time. With every tap you release BRAINROTS, each one stranger and more chaotic than the last. Accumulate energy, unlock upgrades, and watch how the BRAINROTS evolve into impossible forms. From viral classics to MAX POWER versions, the challenge is clear: collect them all before losing your mind. Do you think you can dominate the Brainrot universe with just a click?

title: Solitaire Match
description: Let's develop the village by accumulating coins in Solitaire. When you match cards to make a total of 10, the cards will disappear, earning you coins. Continue removing cards until there are no more matching combinations, and clear the stage by achieving the coin quota. If the quota is not achieved and the slots become full, it's a failure. Earn more coins by matching combinations with a greater number of cards or by continuously matching cards in a short amount of time.

title: Cunning Ginger
description: Cunning Ginger is a super fun game that'll give you lots of excitement and intense emotions! The game follows the adventures of a cute red cat, Ginger, as he goes on a great journey around the world. He's catching falling food items and dodging all sorts of dangerous things along the way. Your goal in the game is to help Ginger explore the world and pick up as many goodies as possible. But beware - there are tons of dangerous obstacles that could harm your furry friend.

title: Magic Bottles
description: Magic Bottles is a calming yet cleverly challenging color-sorting puzzle game. Pour liquids between bottles until each one contains only a single color. While the rules are simple, levels become increasingly complex, introducing new bottle types, tricky layouts, and situations that demand careful planning. Perfect for puzzle fans and players who enjoy logical challenges, Magic Bottles offers a relaxing yet engaging brain-training experience. Restore perfect order, one puzzle at a time.

title: Aventador Vice Crime City
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate realistic traffic and monitor your fuel while exploring busy streets. Enjoy stunning morning city graphics, transforming the city into a spectacle. Pedestrians add unpredictability, and hitting them triggers police chases. Customize your car's appearance and performance. All this chaos is accompanied by your cute dog. Whether evading the cops or just cruising, Aventador Vice Crime City offers a thrilling and visually amazing experience.

title: Roof Car Stunt
description: Challenging car game where you drive and collect coins. Jump around ramps, drive through various obstacles and drive into a giant pink donut to complete the level!

title: Happy Glass Game

The less you draw, the higher your score. With 80 challenging levels, you’ll need to use your creativity and logic to make the glass happy again. Enjoy this delightful game on both desktop and mobile devices!

title: Burger Cafe - Cooking Games For Kids
description: Learn to cook burgers and open your own restaurant! Choose a recipe, gather fresh ingredients, chop veggies, prepare signature sauces, bake buns to perfection, and fry juicy patties. Once everything’s ready, assemble your burger masterpiece, package it, and serve happy customers. Customize your restaurant’s look and unlock new recipes as you rise to become a top chef in town. Dive into the burger-making experience and build the best burger joint around!

title: Car Paint
description: Carpaint is a free, family-friendly HTML5 logic puzzle game and casual brain teaser featuring 30 vibrant color grid challenges. Guide colorful cars across a 3×3 board, leaving paint trails to match reference patterns. This addictive, cross-platform online puzzle works in any browser or on mobile - play now!

title: GMOD Bombs
description:
Experience the power of a high-tech laser cannon in the GMOD Bombs! Collect bombs, create cities, and aim to destroy objects on the map and enjoy spectacular explosions.
GMOD Bombs is an exciting game where you take on the role of a bombardier armed with a futuristic laser cannon. Your task is to collect bombs and strategically destroy various objects and structures on the map. Each bomb has a unique flight trajectory and blast radius, which requires precision and aiming skills.

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Draw To Fly
description: Ready for a game that’s as creative as it is challenging? Draw Fly brings your imagination to life, turning simple drawings into pathways to solve puzzles and conquer obstacles. Whether you’re flying past traps or dodging tricky obstacles, this puzzle game will keep you entertained for hours.

title: Fantasy Math Number
description: Embark on an epic adventure in Fantasy Math Number! Test your math skills in exciting battles against monsters by solving addition, subtraction, and multiplication problems. Every correct answer brings you closer to victory! Power up, defeat enemies, and aim for the highest score in this fun and educational math quest!

title: Kingdom Wars TD
description: Welcome to Kingdom Wars TD, an exciting tower-defense strategy game set in a captivating 2D kingdom. Assume the role of a skilled commander entrusted with the defense of a mighty castle. In your quest, assemble a formidable army comprising up to five soldiers, including archers, warriors, and priests. Brace yourself for the challenge of surviving two perilous waves across various meticulously designed levels scattered throughout the map. Immerse yourself in this thrilling adventure!

title: Super Pop Blast
description: Get ready for a new kind of brick shooter, with unique mechanics, rewarding challenges, and colorful levels. The object: Clear all the blocks using a limited number of balls. Plan your moves, use the score combo system, and try to get 3 stars!

description: Experience the thrill of jailbreak escape, find a way out to freedom in our adventure filled jailbreak games! In this exciting jailbreak escape journey, you’ll take on the role of a character trapped behind jail bars, where every level presents unique challenges and exciting mini games, leading to the final goal of prison escape. Your goal in this prison games? Outsmart the system, solve clever puzzles, and find a way out in this immersive jailbreak escape adventure.

title: Princess Rescue: Save Girl
