Be sure to pay attention to your own strength, because only in this way can you not be destroyed by the enemy!

title: Blue VS Red
description: Sort blue and red items as fast as you can! Drag or use arrow keys to send each item to the correct zone. Build combos, beat the timer, and earn coins to buy power-ups. Challenge yourself in solo mode or compete against AI bots. How high can you score in 30 seconds?

title: Lazy Workers
description: The employees in the office have started slacking off and everyone is asleep. As the boss, you need to get the office back up and running. To do this, use your mouse and send employees to rows of desks. Move workers so they do not bump into each other. Your job will get a little more difficult with each level. If you cannot pass the level, you can use the option to skip the level.

title: Star Attack 3D
description: Star Attack 3D is a thrilling arcade game that masterfully combines classic scrolling shooter gameplay with 3D graphics and modern mechanics. Take control of a powerful spaceship, engage in intense battles to destroy alien blocks, upgrade your ship with advanced features, and conquer a series of challenging levels. Whether you’re a fan of retro shooters or looking for a fresh arcade experience, Star Attack 3D offers endless action and excitement.

title: Burger Tycoon
description: Start your journey as the owner of a small burger joint and work your way up to building a massive fast food empire! Take full control of every aspect of the business—from grilling delicious burgers and serving customers to managing staff and expanding your restaurant chain. Upgrade your kitchen, optimize your workflow, and attract more customers to grow your brand. Can you turn your humble burger stand into the ultimate fast food empire?

title: Stick Fight The Chaos
description: Hello young warriors! In Stick Fight The Chaos, the fierce battles between stickmen continue with even more action! Catch the weapons falling from the sky, challenge your opponent and become the champion of the battlefield! Keep your balance, focus on your enemy and keep fighting! Each level brings new surprises. Play alone or with a friend and defeat your opponents!

title: Packing Line
description: Ship all the cans. Choose a box of the same color as the can. The game is over if you run out of space for boxes and the line stops.

title: Jello Bubbles
description: Classic Match 3 Bubble Shooter Game with jello balls, challenges, a nice bird and a fantastic heroine. Enjoy with lots of fun levels travelling around the world.

title: Labuba Merge
description: Labuba Merge is a fun and relaxing casual merge game where you combine adorable fluffy Labuba to unlock bigger, cuter, and funnier versions! Perfect for kids and adults, this addicting merge puzzle game will challenge your strategy and bring a smile to your face. Just drag, drop, and merge your Labubas to evolve them into new forms. How big can your Labuba grow?

title: Cat Evolution 2
description:
Tap. Evolve. Dominate the Cat Kingdom!

The cats are back, and this time, they're taking over with the power of your fingertips! In Cat Evolution 2,  evolution goes clicker-style.
Tap your way through generations of quirky cats, unlock bizarre and adorable mutations, evolve to the max.

Get your paws ready and your fingers tapping. Cat Evolution 2 is the ultimate idle cat clicker you didn’t know you needed!

title: Real Car Parking And Stunt
description: Welcome to Real Car Parking And Stunt, a challenging driving simulation game. Here you’ll control a car and put your parking and stunt skills to the test. Choose stunt mode or parking mode, each level challenges you to park your car accurately while performing exciting stunts.

title: Roblo X Zombie
description: Get ready for an intense solo survival experience in Zombie Defense Builder! As the last survivor, you must gather supplies, scavenge for collectibles, and build strong defenses to hold off waves of relentless zombies. In this action-packed, strategic game, every second counts. Gather materials, craft powerful barricades, and upgrade your defenses before the next wave hits. Can you survive the apocalypse and fend off the undead for as long as possible

title: Bullet - Superhero
description:
Destroy your opponents in an exciting puzzle game! Become a superhero, shoot ricochets at enemies and win! A physical game with ragdoll-style heroes will help you improve your marksmanship skills and solve difficult missions!
A fun 2D game in which a superhero must destroy all his enemies.
It's not that simple, the hero's hand is constantly moving and you'll have to aim well to hit the target!
Shoot a ricochet at the enemy and complete all levels.

title: Emoji Guess
description: Welcome to the entertaining world of Emoji Guess, a game where every emoji hides a clue. Use your creativity and logic to decode famous phrases, sayings, and movie titles represented by emoji sequences. Each level brings a fresh challenge that will test your imagination and make you smile. Play for free on your phone or computer and see how fluent you are in the universal language of emojis!

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.

title: Block Team Deathmatch
description: Block Team Deathmatch is a first-person shooting simulation game. All models are made of pixel blocks including scenes, characters, and weapons. We have 4v4 Team Mode, Individual Mode, and Sniper Mode for you to select. If I were you, I would play the Team Mode first for better equipment, then challenge the other 2 modes when the rank levels up. If you never played any shooting games, I recommend you buy an auto-rifle to fight at any distance. Keep calm and shoot first!

title: Geometry Arrow
description: Dive into an exhilarating journey through a treacherous cave! Your mission: reach the portal at the end of each level while avoiding deadly spikes and obstacles. With six progressively harder levels, you’ll need sharp reflexes and spot-on timing to survive. Can you conquer every challenge and make it out of the cave? Put your skills to the test in this high-speed action game!

title: Hyper Nurse: Hospital Games
description: Get ready to navigate through the fast-paced world of healthcare, where every second counts. Your mission as a hyper nurse is to provide exceptional care to patients, manage critical situations, and ensure the smooth operation of the hospital. Get ready to put your multitasking skills to the test as you juggle multiple tasks and make crucial decisions in hyper nurse: hospital games.

title: Caterfall 2048
description: Caterfall 2048 is a vibrant reimagining of the classic 2048 puzzle set in a cozy feline atmosphere. It combines familiar merging mechanics with a hexagonal grid and fun "jelly" physics. This game is perfect for all puzzle lovers — whether you want to relax or you're a competitive player striving for a new high score.

title: Snake Puzzle Escape
description: Get ready for a fast-paced puzzle experience where your goal is to wiggle the snake through each grid while avoiding obstacles and other snakes. With simple controls and a variety of challenging levels, this is the perfect game for quick play during your free time.

title: Sort Puzzle - Nuts and Bolts
description: Play Sort Puzzle - Nuts and Bolts, a free and addictive sorting game! Train your brain by stacking nuts of the same color. Simple yet challenging, it's the perfect casual game to relax and sharpen your logic skills. Play now and start sorting!

title: Merge Brainrot 2
description:
Drop and merge the new  Italian Brainrot memes!
From "Bobrito Bandito" to "Špijuniro Golubiro" and "Burbaloni Lulilolli", they’re all here.
What final Brainrot will you unlock? Dare to find out!

title: Fashion Dye Pro
description: Fashion Dye Pro is a fun-filled shirt DIY game. Follow the hottest summer trends! Tie-dye summer clothing and beach accessories! Show off your creative skills by customizing tie-dye outfits to your liking. Get requests from customers and paint garments at will. Being creative isn't hard: first tie it up, then dye it! Unleash your DIY art cells and leave everything to the dye! Get high this summer! Come join us!

title: Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat
description: Ever wanted to experience life as a mischievous cat? In Cat Life Simulator: Devil Cat, you take on the role of a playful yet naughty kitty, causing absolute mayhem inside Grandma’s house—all from a first-person perspective! This exciting 3D simulation game lets you see through the eyes of a troublemaking feline as you knock over furniture, scratch walls, and do everything in your power to drive Grandma crazy! Are you ready to embrace the chaos?

title: The Noob Aventures
description:
The Noob Adventures invites you to join a dangerous journey through a colorful world full of action, traps, and enemies. Travel across challenging lands in search of diamonds and overcome all obstacles. Complete 70 levels packed with danger and surprises as you fight enemies determined to stop your progress. Rescue the friends, survive the challenges along the way, and prove that even a noob can become a true hero.
Collect diamonds and unlock new characters to continue your adventure

title: Run N Shoot
description: You run and you shoot. That’s all you do, but this deceptively simple game mixes up the action and racks up the adrenalin with surprises round every corner to ensure you never get bored. Trigger finger itchy?

title: Kitkat Puzzle
description:
Enter the world of Kitkat Puzzle, a captivating and intricate pin puzzle game where your strategic thinking and creativity are put to the test.

The mission is straightforward - unlock kitkat holes to make these chocolate bars fall in the correct sequence. Sounds simple, yet with unlimited levels of varying complexity, it promises an intriguing brain-teasing journey.

title: Bimka Drive - Smash cars into splinters!
description: Game created in the style of racing, where you will have no restrictions. But it's not that simple. The fact is that the basis here is based on the physics of actions, because every collision of your car with any obstacle will significantly affect its both external and internal condition. The damage model is made very realistically. Your choice will be a variety of different types of car models that you can test on all kinds of racing tracks. The game is very similar to "BeamNG Drive".

title: Manyunya Saving the Princess
description: Welcome to the time when there were knights, magic, farmers, princesses, and generals. Manyunya sets off at the request of the Supreme Lord to save his princess. On the way you will find a whole dangerous adventure, you will come across colorful views, and characters with whom you can communicate and interact, as well as enemies that you will need to defeat at any cost, and save the princess, and complete the task. Interesting voice acting and story will immerse you in this world with your head!

title: Spa empire
description:
? BUILD YOUR DREAM SPA EMPIRE

Have you ever dreamed of running the ultimate spa, offering everything from soothing massages to exciting makeovers? Step into My Spa Empire, the idle arcade game where you dye hair, create stunning hair color makeovers and manage a bustling spa filled with exciting treatments. Design, upgrade, and expand your spa into the ultimate relaxation haven for your guests.

title: EQ Test Puzzle
description: A puzzle game that tests emotional intelligence through emotion recognition and jigsaw puzzles. Match emotional icons, scenarios, and puzzle pieces to train your emotional awareness and problem-solving skills.

title: God's Mixer
description: Gods Mixer is a fun and experimental game where you combine different heads, bodies, and weapons to create unique characters. After assembling them, you can pit them against each other in battles to see which creation reigns supreme. The game encourages creativity through mixing and matching parts for unexpected results.

title: Sworded.io - Spin and Rub.
description: Test your skills in the game – an arcade simulator of sword fights! Fight waves of enemies, upgrade your character, unlock powerful weapons and magic spells. Demonstrate your tactics and reaction in dynamic battles!

title: Design With Me SuperHero Tutu Outfits
description: Welcome to Design With Me SuperHero Tutu Outfits. We all love superheroes very much! Likewise, our favorite princesses are inspired more by superhero tutu fashion. They planned to organize the fashion events under this theme. Join and help each princess to pick a suitable superhero tutu outfit. Play them and have fun!

title: Boyfriend For Hire
description: Pushed by her mom to start dating, studious Amy hires charming transfer student Javier to pose as her boyfriend. Rival Christie, jealous rumors, and a flirty study partner turn the act into real complications. Choose outfits, make tough choices, and decide if this love is real—or just for show.

title: Red Stickman vs Craftmans
description: The red stickman found himself in a land of monsters from Minecraft and in order to escape he must defeat them all in hand-to-hand combat.

title: My Castle. Merge & Story
description:
My Castle: Merge & Story is a relaxing merge 2 puzzle game set in a warm and atmospheric medieval world of renewal, mystery, and self-discovery. Merge items, restore and decorate an ancient castle, and follow the journey of a young princess who chooses a new path in life.
This calm offline merge adventure combines cozy gameplay, castle restoration, and a story about starting over — far from royal expectations, closer to one’s true self.
Restore and Decorate a Forgotten Castle

title: Squad Assembler
description:
Assemble a cool squad and see who wins!
Combine items to improve the fighters' equipment! Combine weapons and armor, buy loot boxes with new weapons!
You can create cool, unique characters, each of which will have certain skills! Buy parts for your fighters, change their arms, torso, head! Create real cyborgs to defeat the enemy! Merge armor and weapons, increase the levels and characteristics of items. Hire cool heroes who will help you in tough battles.

title: Find Objects - Hidden Item
description:
Find objects on colorful maps with links and Easter eggs!
An interesting puzzle casual indie game in the genres of "Hidden Objects" and "Find the Differences"!

Embark on an exciting journey through beautiful 2D locations, where hundreds of hidden objects and riddles await you! Explore picturesque landscapes, mysterious cities and magical worlds to find all the hidden objects. And in the "Spot the Difference" mode, test your attentiveness by comparing two almost identical pictures!

title: Rescue Rift
description: Embark on a heart-pounding mission in "Rescue Rift," an intense and immersive action-adventure game that challenges your tactical skills and courage. As an elite operative of an undercover rescue team, you find yourself thrust into the depths of danger as you attempt to save hostages who have been kidnapped and confined within the eerie confines of an old, abandoned hospital.

title: Cake Merge
description: Cake Merge is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you build whole cakes from colorful slices. Clear the tray, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and unlock new desserts as you play. With smooth animations, cute visuals, and easy-to-learn gameplay, Cake Merge is perfect for fans of casual merge, sorting, and matching games. Earn points, level up, and enjoy the sweetest merges!

title: Slope Snowball
description: Slope SnowBall is an intriguing endless-running game with a winter theme. Your aim is to roll a snowball as far as possible down slopes full of hazards!

title: Triple Sort 3D Home Design
description: Welcome to the world of Triple Sort 3D: Home Design, where matching meets decorating! Dive in the puzzle-solving with and begin crafting a virtual space of your dreams. Get ready to transform ugly and cluttered rooms  into clean and cozy spaces! Discover the perfect blend of challenges, creativity, and an epic makeover journey that awaits you!

title: Press "A" to Party
description: Press A to Party is a casual arcade game collection designed for players of all ages. Gather your friends and family, settle onto the couch, and dive into the action with simple one-button controls and fast-paced gameplay. Compete against up to 4 players on the same screen, vying for the coveted title of the ultimate arcade champion. Get ready for a blast of fun and excitement at your next gathering!

title: Idle Airport CEO
description:
Step into the shoes of a savvy CEO and take control of your very own airport!

As you progress, collect passengers and upgrade your capabilities to increase plane capacity, speed, and efficiency. Optimize check-in times, revenue streams, and airline services to keep your customers happy and coming back for more.

Oh, and did we mention that your money is piling up as we speak? Go offline, return and claim profits.

title: SLIDE STONE
description: Horisontally slide the blocks and create a complete row across the board. Every time you slide a block and additional blocks are added from the bottom of the board. If you create multiple rows simultanepusly or create a row consecutively that becomes a COMBO! Good luck and let's aim for the high score!

title: Paris Kiss
description: Welcome to Paris Kiss, a fun and quirky puzzle game where your goal is simple — bring the characters together for a kiss

title: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle
description: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle presents a fresh take on the classic word puzzle genre. With an array of unique gameplay mechanics, hints, and events, players are immersed in an engaging experience. The game's USP is its diverse content, offering a wide range of quotes across various themes, from inspirational to literary and beyond.

title: Unscrew Wood Puzzle
description: Unscrew Wood Puzzle: Screw Jam is an engaging puzzle game that combines logic, strategy, and dexterity in a tactile experience. Players are challenged to solve intricate puzzles involving bolts, nuts, and screws. With hundreds of unique levels, this game provides a blend of relaxation and mental stimulation, perfect for casual gamers and puzzle enthusiasts alike. The beautifully designed wooden and metallic elements create a visually appealing and satisfying gameplay experience.
